news.Title: Warren Buffett's Successor, Greg Abel, Just Unloaded Amazon Shares and Tripled His Position in This Magnificent Seven AI Stock That's Climbed 100% Over the Past Year
news.Content:
Investors have long looked to Warren Buffett for investing advice. Why? Because the billionaire, at the helm of Berkshire Hathaway , delivered year after year of market-beating returns. In fact, over six decades as chief executive officer, he helped his team generate a compounded annual gain of more than 19% -- that's compared to 10% for the S&P 500 .

Buffett handed the role of CEO over to longtime Berkshire Hathaway executive Greg Abel at the start of this year, so the first quarter offered us a first glimpse into Abel's investing strategy. Abel has spoken many times of his intention to follow the path established by Buffett -- this means Buffett-watchers may be eager to seek investing inspiration from this new CEO, too.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need.

Continue »

Just recently, fund managers overseeing more than $100 million reported their latest trades to the Securities and Exchange Commission on Form 13F, as they must do this on a quarterly basis. And Abel's 13F shows us that he unloaded all of Berkshire Hathaway's Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) shares and tripled his position in the following Magnificent Seven artificial intelligence (AI) stock that's climbed 100% over the past year. Let's check out these moves.

Buffett's investment strategy

First, though, it's important to consider Berkshire Hathaway's general investing strategy with Buffett at the helm. The billionaire has always favored investing in quality companies at reasonable prices and holding on for the long term.

When it comes to industries, Buffett rarely invests in technology stocks as he favors investing in areas that he knows and understands very well. That said, he's been known to buy shares in certain technology players that are market leaders -- and certain have been chosen by his investment managers. That was the case of Amazon, a stock one of Buffett's managers bought back in the first quarter of 2019. Prior to this, Buffett publicly expressed regret for not getting in on Amazon stock even earlier.

Buffett held onto Amazon stock since that purchase, and from the end of the first quarter of 2019 through the end of last year, Amazon climbed about 160%.

The company experienced some tough moments during times of higher interest rates and supply chain problems, but a revamp of its cost structure, as well as a focus on the AI market, has boosted earnings and the stock price in more recent times.

Story Continues

Abel's latest move

Now, let's consider the move Abel made in the first quarter concerning Amazon and another Magnificent Seven technology stock.

Abel closed out Berkshire Hathaway's Amazon position. Before that move, it represented just under 0.2% of the portfolio.

Abel more than tripled his position in Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) class A shares. Berkshire Hathaway now holds 54,249,798 of these shares, and they represent 5.9% of the portfolio. Buffett originally bought Alphabet shares in the third quarter of last year.

Meanwhile, Abel opened a new position in Alphabet's class C shares -- these carry no voting rights -- and now holds 3,585,215 shares. This accounts for 0.4% of the portfolio.

When investors file 13F forms, they don't provide reasons for their buys and sells, so we don't know exactly why Abel made these moves. But, considering Buffett's ideas about buying quality stocks at interesting valuations, we might assume that valuation could have been one of the reasons behind the decision.

A look at valuation

While Amazon wasn't expensive during the first quarter of the year, Alphabet stock looked even cheaper, at one point trading at a low of about 19x forward earnings estimates.

Meanwhile, Alphabet has something else Buffett likes, and that's a solid moat or competitive advantage. Alphabet is the owner of Google Search, which consistently holds about 90% of the global search market -- and importantly, this drives the lion's share of Alphabet's revenue as advertisers rush to advertise their products and services across the Google platform.

At the same time, the company's presence in AI -- selling tools and services through its cloud business -- is supercharging revenue growth. So, Alphabet offers the safety and competitive advantage that Buffett likes while at the same time offering investors the potential to benefit from the AI boom. And the great news here is this move may please a broad range of investors -- from those seeking safety to those favoring growth.

news.Title: Why 1 Top Wall Street Analyst Thinks Micron Stock Can Soar Another 85%
news.Content:
Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) has been one of the biggest winners of the last 12 months. Shares of the memory chip maker have skyrocketed close to 850%. And one top Wall Street analyst thinks Micron has plenty of room to run.

UBS Group (NYSE: UBS) analyst Timothy Arcuri raised his 12-month price target on Micron from $535 to $1,625 on Tuesday. His move sparked a huge rally for the tech stock . But based on Arcuri's price target, Micron could still soar another 85%.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need.

Continue »

Trade like Nvidia

Arcuri is much more bullish about Micron for one primary reason: He likes the company's long-term agreements with customers. Micron now has enhanced agreements with fixed volume commitments from customers that range from three to five years. Such deals were practically unheard of in the past for memory chip companies, but the market dynamics have changed dramatically thanks to artificial intelligence (AI) demand.

These long-term agreements provide significant visibility in demand for Micron over the next few years. They should also make the company's earnings less lumpy. Sure, Micron may give up some revenue over the near term with these deals, but Arcuri likes the trade-off.

The UBS analyst based his $1,625 price target assuming that Micron would generate earnings per share of between $117 and $155 over the next three years. He also expects the stock to trade at around 15 times forward earnings.

However, Arcuri believes that there's no reason why Micron shouldn't trade similarly to Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , which currently sports a forward price-to-earnings multiple of around 24.5. CNBC reported Arcuri as stating, "The market will start to put a more 'normal' multiple on the stock and MU will continue to rerate higher."

UBS isn't the only Wall Street firm that has become more bullish about Micron in recent days. Citigroup (NYSE: C) nearly doubled its price target on the stock last week. However, analysts are having trouble keeping up with Micron's rapid gains. Citi's target of $840 is already below the memory maker's share price.

Can Micron really soar 85% higher?

Despite its impressive returns over the last 12 months, Micron's shares only trade at 7.6 times forward earnings. That's a low multiple, even for a cyclical stock . It doesn't seem farfetched whatsoever that Micron could really soar another 85% higher as UBS projects.

Story Continues

However, there's still a risk that such optimism could be unfounded. Should the demand for high bandwidth memory slow, Micron's stock could sink.

news.Title: The Odds Are Stacked in Favor of This AI Stock. Here's the Math.
news.Content:
When investors look at artificial intelligence (AI) stocks , the biggest challenge is choosing which avenue is the best bet -- because nearly everywhere you look, there are multiple names from which to choose.

Want to invest in AI chips? Nvidia is the biggest player, but it's challenged by Advanced Micro Devices and Broadcom . Hyperscalers like Amazon and Alphabet are designing their own chips, with an eye on reducing their dependence on outside companies. And there's a new stock, Cerebras Systems , with a successful IPO, making chips more powerful than Nvidia's . It's already making some waves.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Maybe cloud computing and AI infrastructure are better options? Good luck there, as Amazon, Microsoft , and Alphabet's Google Cloud are battling for supremacy. Want to invest in data centers? Your choices include Nebius Group , Iren , CoreWeave , and data center real estate investment trusts such as Digital Realty Trust and Equinix .

Get the picture? There are choices everywhere.

So if you really want the closest thing you can find to a sure thing in the AI space, the best bet you can make is on a company that has such a massive advantage that the top companies -- many of which we've already talked about here -- have no choice but to be customers.

That leads us directly to Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) . The math, in this case, doesn't lie.

Taiwan Semiconductor has an incredible growth story

Taiwan Semiconductor, also known as TSMC, doesn't make its own chips. But it's a foundry -- the largest foundry in the world that makes chips designed by other companies. And the growth of AI has had a dramatic impact on TSMC's revenue -- and how it gets its money. Since 2020, the percentage of revenue from high-performance computing chips has skyrocketed, as have TSMC's revenue and profitability.

Period

Smartphone Revenue

High-Performance Computing Revenue

Internet of Things Revenue

Automotive Revenue

Digital Consumer Electronics Revenue

Other Revenue

Q1 2020

Q1 2023

Q1 2026

Data source: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing.

In the first quarter, TSMC generated $35.9 billion in revenue with a whopping 50.5% net profit margin. The company reported earnings per share (EPS) of 22.08 New Taiwan dollars ($0.70). That's a vast jump from just three years ago, when TSMC had $19.6 billion in Q1 revenue and EPS of $0.29.

Story Continues

And even more tellingly, TSMC's improving technology is driving sales. In the most recent quarter, 61% of its revenue came from making 3-nanometer and 5nm chips, which have smaller transistors than 7nm and larger chips, meaning they can hold more components and are more powerful. In the first quarter of 2023, 67% of TSMC's revenue came from making chips 7nm and larger.

TSMC's incredible competitive moat

TSMC has an estimated 70% of the total market's chip manufacturing revenue and counts Nvidia, Intel , Broadcom, Qualcomm , Apple , and other big names as its customers. Intel is a potential competitor, but it has yet to secure an anchor company for its fledgling foundry business.

That leaves TSMC as the best -- and for some chipmakers only -- viable option. TSMC stock is up 33% so far this year, and all indications are that it will continue to move higher as the growth of AI fuels its business.

news.Title: Amazon invests $20 billion in UK in 2025
news.Content:
LONDON, May 27 (Reuters) - Amazon invested over £15 billion ($20 billion) in Britain in ‌2025, keeping the e-commerce giant ‌on track to deliver its planned £40 billion investment ​in the three years to the end of 2027, it said on Wednesday.

Investments in 2025 included the launch of new ‌operational sites, expanded ⁠studio production facilities and office space, as well as the ⁠start of a drone deliveries trial.

More from Yahoo Scout

How much did Amazon invest in Britain during 2025?

How significant is Amazon's UK employment and market position?

What taxes did Amazon pay in the UK?

What new services and facilities did Amazon launch?

Updating on its annual UK economic impact and ​tax disclosure, ​Amazon also ​said:

• In 2025, the ‌total revenues of its activities in the UK were more than £30 billion.

• Total taxes borne were over £1.3 billion, up over 20% versus 2024. This includes ‌corporation tax, business rates, ​national insurance and digital ​services tax.

• ​It employs around 75,000 in ‌the UK, making it ​one of ​the country's top 10 private sector employers.

• The UK is Amazon’s third-largest ​market globally, ‌after the United States and Germany.

($1 = ​0.7421 pounds)

(Reporting by James Davey: Editing ​by Chiara Rodriquez)

news.Title: 台股站上4萬4！三大法人合買307億 外資買超381億
news.Content:
台股今（27）日上漲731點，收盤來到44256點創新高，成交量來到1.55兆。三大法人合計買超307.64億元，其中外資買超381.28億元，連5日買超，投信、自營商則賣超。

觀察三大法人籌碼動向，外資買超381.27億；投信今日則終結連6買，賣超42.76億元；自營商也同步轉賣超30.87億元；三大法人合計買超307.63億元。

受惠於記憶體大廠美光股價飆漲19%，記憶體族群今日走勢強勁，華邦電來到155元，漲幅逾9%，青雲漲幅逾7%，華東、廣穎漲停，南亞科早盤一度衝上333.5元漲停，後續遭賣壓出籠，終場以312元作收，漲2.8%。

被動元件族群也吸引買盤進駐，凱美、立隆電、華新科、雲嘉南、今展科漲停，國巨*、禾伸堂也逾有6%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 台積電分紅風波！魏哲家喊話：今年增幅有望超過30%
news.Content:
即時中心／林韋慈報導

針對近期部分台積電員工反映分紅縮水的不滿情緒，台積電董事長魏哲家今（27）日上午召開內部溝通會，據了解，他在會中強調公司盈餘分配長期以「同仁、股東、社會」三大面向為核心，並每年依營運狀況審慎檢視配置比例，以兼顧各方需求。他更指出，自2023年至今，員工分紅年增幅度均不低於30%，今年在績效表現與去年相當的前提下，預期全年分紅仍將維持強勁成長，增幅可望延續去年水準甚至進一步提升。

魏哲家親上火線回應：分紅成長不低於3成

根據了解，魏哲家在會中指出，同仁重視工作價值、薪資福利與職涯發展；股東期待企業穩健成長並獲得合理報酬；而企業同時也須承擔對社會環境與資源永續的責任，因此台積電在盈餘運用上，需平衡三方利益，落實永續經營方針。

他並重申，今年台積電將進一步提高對社會永續相關資源的投入比重，強化企業對台灣社會的回饋。不過對員工的薪酬與福利承諾不會改變。

魏哲家指出，近年公司營運持續擴張、獲利成長明顯，台積電也感謝員工的貢獻。自2023年至今，員工分紅年增幅度均不低於30%，今年在績效表現與去年相當的前提下，預期全年分紅仍將維持強勁成長，增幅可望延續去年水準甚至進一步提升。

原文出處： 快新聞／台積電分紅風波！魏哲家喊話：今年增幅有望超過30%

news.Title: 台股狂飆 5月投資股票信心逆勢創逾三年低
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-27 15:13:05 陳怡潔 發佈

台股又衝歷史新高，但民眾對台股投資信心卻見反轉；國立中央大學台灣經濟發展研究中心今(27)日公布今(2026)年5月消費者信心指數(CCI)總指數下滑0.39點至62.08點(附圖)，創下2023年1月以來的逾三年新低，其中，「未來半年投資股票時機」指標大減1.03點至22.06點，為5月下降幅度最多的指標，並同創2023年1月以來的逾三年新低，顯示台股狂飆並屢創新高之際，民眾居高思危、不認為現在是進場的好時機，希望等待修正再進場。

台經中心表示，2026年5月消費者信心指數(CCI)總指數降至62.08點，與上個月比較下降0.39點；本次調查有一項指標上升(物價水準)、五項下降(家庭經濟狀況、國內經濟景氣、就業機會、投資股票時機、購買耐久性財貨)；而從絕對水準來看，六項指標均偏向悲觀。

其中，5月下降幅度最多的指標為「未來半年投資股票時機」，調查值22.06點、月降1.03點，並同創2023年1月來新低，調查顯示有88%受訪者認為未來半年不是投資股票的好時機。中央大學台經中心執行長吳大任表示，台股成交量屢創新高，但目前當沖占比近四成，投機氛圍濃厚，市場出現「賭博化」的傾向，FOMO情緒讓大批投資人借錢進場，甚至將購屋資金轉向投入股市，出現股房不連動的情況；而因台股指數已處在歷史高檔，民眾也擔憂在此時進場容易被套牢在高點，因此，5月CCI數據也反映出居高思危的心態；但是，民眾並非對股市失去信心，而是認為現階段並非理想進場時機，可能抱持觀望態度，想等待市場出現較大幅度的修正後再布局。

台經中心並指出，5月下降幅度第二的指標為「未來半年購買耐久性財」，調查值91.68點、月降0.65點；下降幅度第三的指標為「未來半年國內經濟景氣」，調查值79.26點、月降0.41點；下降幅度第四的指標為「未來半年家庭經濟狀況」，調查值76.02點、月降0.37點；下降幅度最少的指標為「未來半年就業機會」，調查值70.7點、月降0.3點。而5月唯一上升的指標為「未來半年物價水準」，調查值32.77點、月升0.45點。

另外，「購買房地產時機」指標部分，台經中心表示，5月調查結果為88.51點，與上月的調查結果相較下降0.72點。「目前健康狀況」指標部分，5月調查結果為84.92點，較上月的調查結果上升1.76點。「預期健康狀況」指標部分，5月調查結果為80.01點，與上個月的調查結果相較上升2.0點。

2026年5月消費者信心指數調查是由中央大學台灣經濟發展研究中心主辦，輔仁大學AI人工智慧發展中心、健康力股份有限公司與台灣房屋集團調查協辦，調查期間為5月18日至21日，以電話訪問的方式進行，採電腦隨機抽樣，共訪問3346位台灣地區20歲以上的民眾，在95%的信心水準下，抽樣誤差為正負2.0個百分點。

陸上月非在校16-24歲失業率降至16.3%

高庫存、低成交量衝擊，建商降價壓力估愈來愈大

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Nasdaq 100 Index ETF, Micron, SanDisk, NVIDIA, MicroStrategy and Qualcomm
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – May 27, 2026 – Today, Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Nasdaq 100 Index ETF QQQ, Micron MU, SanDisk SNDK, NVIDIA NVDA, MicroStrategy MSTR and Qualcomm QCOM.

Memory Supercycle: Why MY & SNDK Are Set for a Grand Finale

The current technology bull market is nothing short of spectacular. Despite inflation, trade, and geopolitical concerns, the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index ETF is up a staggering 30% from its late March lows and is working on its ninth weekly gain out of the previous 10.

What’s driving tech stocks? The AI boom. The current AI boom is witnessing unprecedented spending, with AI big tech hyperscalers spending ~$750 million in capital expenditures (CAPEX) this year on AI data centers and infrastructure (with expectations for more than $1 trillion a year in 2027 and 2028).

Memory Sector Experiences Supercycle

The breathtaking AI spending has reverberated throughout the U.S. and global economies. However, certain industries have benefited more than others. Thus far, the biggest beneficiaries of the AI buildout have been high-performance memory companies like Micron and SanDisk .

AI models mostly operate on NVIDIA’s best-in-breed graphics processing units (GPUs). These GPUs take complex pieces of data, train them, and make sense of them. These AI models (like large language models) rely on billions of algebraic variables called weights. To process a single prompt, the GPU must continuously reference these weights. Standard memory solutions do not store enough data to enable AI training, but SNDK and MU’s technologies do.

Memory Demand Outstrips Supply

Currently, global demand for memory is so robust that most Wall Street analysts predict severe supply shortages for at least 2 years. These supply shortages have triggered unprecedented pricing power for SNDK and MU. As a result, Zacks Consensus Estimates expect explosive EPS growth for these companies. Below is a look at the Zacks Consensus Estimates for SanDisk:

SNDK/MU: True Market Leaders

SanDisk and Micron are what I would call “true market leaders.” TMLs have the magic elixir of liquidity, bullish catalysts, hyper-earnings growth, and robust price and volume action. Over the past year, the performance in these two companies has been unbelievable, with MU rising 851% and SNDK soaring a staggering 4,185%!

Climax Moves Coming?

By now, with the explosive price action, fundamentals, and AI hype, Wall Street investors and even retail investors have caught on. However, that does not necessarily mean the underlying stock moves are over. In fact, leaders like MU and SNDK usually end with fireworks, not a whimper. My best guess is that these stocks are at the beginning of their climactic, blow-off top moves (which could yield massive gains in a short period). To learn more about the nuts and bolts of a climax move, read my article where I covered the climax moves in MicroStrategy and Qualcomm .

Story Continues

Bottom Line

While value-conscious investors might look at the multi-hundred percent gains in Micron and SanDisk and think they missed the boat, history tells a different story. True Market Leaders backed by hyper earnings growth and severe global supply shortages rarely exit the stage quietly; they finish with a bang. As massive liquidity and AI hype converge, we are likely witnessing the opening innings of a classic, vertical blow-off top.

Why Haven't You Looked at Zacks' Top Stocks?

Since 2000, our top stock-picking strategies have blown away the S&P's +7.7% average gain per year. Amazingly, they soared with average gains of +48.4%, +50.2% and +56.7% per year.

Today you can access their live picks without cost or obligation.

news.Title: The Conversation Nobody Is Having About Quantum Computing -- and the Stock at the Center of It
news.Content: Every conversation about quantum computing follows the same script. Is it five years away? Is it 10? Did Alphabet just achieve something meaningful, or was it another overhyped benchmark? The debate loops endlessly, and most investors either go all-in on the hype or walk away entirely. All that quantum computing framing misses something important. And it's why I keep coming back to Infleqtion (NYSE: INFQ) . Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Quantum sensing is a commercialized technology already generating revenue, distinct from the debate on when fault-tolerant quantum computers will arrive.
• Infleqtion (INFQ) offers a full-stack quantum technology portfolio, including quantum computers and atomic clocks, with applications in defense and critical infrastructure.
• The company's neutral atom qubit approach is seen as advantageous over superconducting qubits due to manufacturing scalability.
• Infleqtion has secured significant funding and partnerships, including a $100 million letter of intent from the U.S. Department of Commerce and collaboration with Nvidia.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, quantum sensing, atomic clocks, neutral atoms, commercialization

news.Title: Analysis-Europe's push to break Big Tech's grip tempered by internal debate
news.Content: By Foo Yun Chee BRUSSELS, May 27 (Reuters) - European leaders are divided on how far to go in curbing Big Tech as they weigh momentous decisions over giving EU firms preferential access to mobile satellite spectrum and limiting large multinationals' access to EU cloud tenders. On Tuesday, ‌Reuters reported Brussels was likely to leave an opening for Elon Musk's Starlink and Amazon's low-earth-orbit satellite business Leo to acquire ...
news.AI_Summary:
• European leaders are divided on how to curb Big Tech's dominance, with debates on preferential access to mobile satellite spectrum and limiting cloud tender access for large multinationals.
• Proposed EU cloud tender restrictions aim to temper the influence of U.S. firms like Amazon (63% cloud market share with Google and Microsoft), reflecting efforts to strengthen European tech sovereignty.
• There is a significant €1 trillion investment gap in cloud infrastructure compared to the United States.
• The EU's Cloud and AI Development Act, expected June 3, may restrict but not block access for Amazon, Microsoft, and Google in sensitive public procurement projects.
news.Keywords: Big Tech, cloud market, tech sovereignty, regulatory risk, market share

news.Title: The SpaceX IPO Could Be the Biggest in History. Here's What Investors Should Know Before It Lists
news.Content: Elon Musk's rocket and satellite company, SpaceX , filed to go public earlier this month, setting the stage for what could become the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history. In a prospectus released on May 20, the company said it plans to list its Class A shares on the Nasdaq under the ticker SPCX, with a debut that could arrive as soon as next month. The figures being floated are staggering. SpaceX is reportedly targeting a valuation around $1.75 trillion, and there have been reports that the number could push above $2 trillion. Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX has filed for an IPO targeting a valuation of around $1.75 trillion, potentially raising $75 billion.
• SpaceX reported $18.7 billion in revenue for 2025, a 33% increase, but incurred a net loss of $4.9 billion.
• The connectivity segment (Starlink) generated $11.4 billion in revenue and $4.4 billion in operating profit, but average revenue per user is declining.
• The space and AI segments incurred significant losses, with the AI segment posting a $6.4 billion operating loss on $3.2 billion revenue.
• The filing reveals a complex financial picture with profitability challenges despite a high valuation, and historical IPOs of this size have often disappointed investors.
news.Keywords: IPO, valuation, revenue, net loss, Starlink, AI segment

news.Title: Apple Stock Hits New Record Highs as AI Doubts Begin to Fade
news.Content: As the most searched for stock on Zacks.com, Apple’s AAPL ) remarkable rally has accelerated in recent weeks. news.AI_Summary:

• Apple's integrated ecosystem, controlling hardware, software, and services, is seen as a significant advantage in the AI-driven world.
• The company's installed base of over 2 billion active devices provides a large distribution platform for AI-powered services.

news.Title: Goldman Sachs gives harsh warning on market concentration
news.Content: Goldman Sachs is sounding the alarm on what it sees as a dangerous concentration in the artificial intelligence-driven stock market rally. In a May 15 report , Goldman Sachs strategist Ben Snider said the S&P 500 has climbed 10% this year, but the gains have become heavily concentrated in technology and AI-linked ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Goldman Sachs warns of dangerous market concentration driven by AI enthusiasm, with technology stocks accounting for 85% of the S&P 500's 2026 return.
• Nvidia alone contributed 20% of the S&P 500's total return, now representing 9% of the index by market value.
• The report highlights historical parallels with periods of narrow leadership preceding higher volatility and weaker equity returns.
• Goldman Sachs proposes an 'insensitive portfolio' strategy focusing on stocks with positive earnings revisions but low sensitivity to AI and macro shifts, including sectors like consumer staples, healthcare, and real estate.
• The blurring lines between AI and crypto are noted, with Bitcoin miners like TeraWulf pivoting to AI data centers and AI tokens tracking equity sentiment.
news.Keywords: market concentration, AI rally, S&P 500, volatility, portfolio strategy

The filings ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta is laying off nearly 1,400 employees in Washington state as part of its AI overhaul and restructuring efforts.
• These layoffs are a continuation of Meta's plan to eliminate approximately 10% of its global workforce while shifting employees to AI-focused roles.
• The cuts affect a broad range of technical positions, including software engineers, data scientists, and IT staff.
• Meta is significantly increasing its spending on AI infrastructure, including data centers and advanced chips, to compete in the AI race.
• CEO Mark Zuckerberg has emphasized AI as central to Meta's future strategy, even as the company reduces headcount.
news.Keywords: layoffs, AI restructuring, workforce reduction, AI infrastructure spending, strategic shift

news.Title: Nvidia CEO has blunt message on AI layoffs in 2026
news.Content: Amazon cited AI efficiency when it eliminated 16,000 corporate roles. Microsoft cited AI when it cut more than 15,000 positions. Across Big Tech, the explanation for layoffs has become almost predictable: we are doing more with less, and AI is why. Jensen Huang has a problem with that story. And he said so plainly. What Huang said and the exact words he used Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang pushed back directly on the practice of blaming AI for layoffs in an interview with Singapore broadcaster CNA on May 26, according to Business Insider . "I think the narrative that connects AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang criticizes the narrative that blames AI for corporate layoffs, calling it 'lazy' and chronologically flawed.
• Huang argues that generative AI tools have only become widely useful in the last one to two years, making it impossible for layoffs prior to that to be AI-driven.
• He suggests that companies using AI as a justification for layoffs may be masking older, more uncomfortable reasons like cost pressure or over-hiring.
• Huang previously stated at Nvidia's GTC conference that companies citing AI for layoffs lack imagination and strategic vision.
• He advises workers not to fear AI but to learn to use it, stating that job loss is more likely due to not using AI effectively rather than AI itself replacing jobs.
news.Keywords: AI adoption, corporate strategy, workforce reduction, leadership vision, future of work

news.Title: Stop Looking at Earnings: The Real Threat to AI Stocks Is the Collapse of Compute Prices
news.Content: Today, Wall Street is obsessed with a question: “Where is the money from AI?” Analysts are meticulously calculating return on investment (ROI), studying the revenue from subscriptions, and doubting whether software companies will be able to monetize the gigantic capital expenses that Big Tech is pouring into infrastructure. In my opinion, though, there is another question to ask. The real threat to the tech sector — and the whole U.S. stock market — is not hiding in a deficit of ideas for AI monetization but in a classic economic shock: a crisis of computing power overproduction. Investors are used to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A potential overproduction of computing power poses a significant threat to AI stocks and the broader tech market.
• The GPU shortage of 2023-2024 has led to an unprecedented data center building boom by hyperscalers like Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet.
• New, more efficient chips and the completion of these data centers are leading to falling rental rates for GPUs, impacting unit economics.
• While demand for calculations (teraflops) is growing exponentially, the revenue pool in the cloud rental market may shrink due to price competition.
• Specialized GPU providers and 'neo-clouds' are expected to be the first to suffer from falling rental prices and potential inability to service debt.
news.Keywords: compute oversupply, GPU rental rates, data center build-out, cloud market dynamics, margin compression

news.Title: Nvidia sends blunt message on China AI chip demand
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) is suffering from a China problem. However, it has a China opportunity as well. CEO Jensen Huang said the company’s prediction of a $200 billion central processing unit market includes China, showing that Nvidia still anticipates strong long-term demand in one of the world’s most important AI markets. That matters because China is both a growth lever and a regulatory issue for Nvidia. The company wants access to Chinese clients, but U.S. export rules and China’s own drive to create domestic chip manufacturers continue to block that access. Nvidia already dominates the AI processor industry used ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia faces challenges in the China market due to U.S. export restrictions and China's push for domestic chip production, despite anticipating long-term demand.
• The company's CEO, Jensen Huang, indicated that the new Vera central processors (CPUs) target a potential $200 billion market, including China.
• Nvidia has U.S. permits to export H200 AI chips to China, but Chinese government approval is pending, hindering sales.
• Nvidia is also developing its Vera Rubin platform, integrating CPUs and GPUs, to diversify beyond GPUs and solidify its role in AI data centers.

news.Title: Apple's AI strategy challenge might be solved by the iPhone's 'agentic AI moat'

news.AI_Summary:

• Mohan raised Apple's price target to $380 from $330, implying ~20% upside, and maintained a Buy rating.
• AI agents, semi-autonomous digital helpers, are driving demand for GPUs and CPUs, but Apple could leverage its iPhone as a secure interface for these agents.
• Apple's Mac devices, particularly Mac Mini and Mac Studio, are experiencing higher-than-expected demand due to their AI capabilities, with supply-demand balance expected in several months.
news.Keywords: agentic AI, ecosystem control, AI moat, user intent, platform leverage

news.Title: The SpaceX IPO Has an Unusual Lockup Policy for Insiders. Here's What Investors Need to Know.
news.Content: Whenever retail investors are considering investing in an initial public offering (IPO) or a stock shortly after it goes public, they should check the lockup provisions in the company's prospectus or registration statement. Lockups dictate when company insiders who acquired a stake in a company before it goes public can sell those shares. Company insiders typically are executives or board members with shares, or anyone with at least a 10% stake in voting shares. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? news.AI_Summary:

• Founder Elon Musk is exempt from these early release provisions.
• The early lockup provisions may reduce pressure at the 180-day mark but could increase stock volatility in the early post-IPO period.

美國股市周一(25日)因適逢陣亡將士紀念日休市一天，四大指數無交易。少了美股風向球指引，亞洲市場走勢分歧，日股下跌0.25%；韓股強漲2.55%，登上8千大關，盤中與收盤同步改寫新高；港股小跌0.03%；上證指數走弱0.17%。

回到台股，台股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日盤中創高後翻黑下跌119.03點，收43,525.37點，成交金額爆出1兆4,751.03億元歷史新天量。

news.Title: This AI Stock's Valuation Makes No Sense to Me. Here's Why That's a Good Thing.
news.Content: The meteoric rise of Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) stock almost seems unbelievable. If you had bought in at the initial public offering (IPO) in February 2025 at about $36 per share, you would have seen the shares skyrocket almost 4,100% to their current price of about $1,480. This year alone, Sandisk stock has risen roughly 520% as of May 22. Will AI create the world's first ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) stock has seen a significant rise, increasing approximately 4,100% since its IPO in February 2025 and 520% year-to-date.
• The company is a leading manufacturer of NAND drives and solid-state drives, benefiting from the memory chip supercycle and high demand for AI computing.
• Sandisk has sold out NAND flash drives for 2026 and is booking backlog for 2027, indicating strong pricing power.
• In the recent fiscal third quarter, revenue rose 97% quarter-over-quarter to $5.9 billion, and net income increased 350% to $3.6 billion.
• Gross margin reached 78.4%, and the company anticipates further revenue growth and margin expansion in the fiscal fourth quarter.
news.Keywords: Memory chip, NAND drives, Solid-state drives, AI computing, Revenue growth

news.Title: Ferrari Falls After Disappointing Reviews of Its First EV
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Ferrari NV shares fell almost 8% after critics panned the look of its first fully electric vehicle, a setback for the Italian supercar maker’s controversial push into EVs. Most Read from Bloomberg Nvidia CEO Urges Super Micro to Tighten Up on Compliance Trump Doctor Visit Renews Health Scrutiny as 80th Birthday Nears Trump Says He’ll Announce Negotiated Deal With Iran Shortly Rubio Sees Good News Coming on Hormuz as Iran Talks Continue US, Iran Inch Toward Deal as Gaps Remain on Uranium, Sanctions The unveiling of the €550,000 ($640,000) Ferrari Luce drew largely negative reactions from industry analysts ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ferrari's stock fell nearly 8% following negative reviews of its first electric vehicle, the Ferrari Luce.
• Critics compared the design of the €550,000 EV to mass-market vehicles, with Apple's former head of design, Jony Ive, influencing the interior.
• The launch faces challenges as demand for high-end EVs becomes unpredictable, and competitors like Lamborghini and Porsche slow their electrification plans.
• The Ferrari Luce delivers over 1,000 horsepower and accelerates to 100 km/h in 2.5 seconds, with a top speed over 310 kph.
• This EV launch is a critical test for Ferrari to balance electrification with its brand identity of limited supply and high pricing.
news.Keywords: Electric vehicle, Product launch, Design criticism, Market demand, Brand strategy

news.Title: SpaceX Just Filed for the Biggest IPO in History -- and One Number Has Wall Street Buzzing
news.Content: Any fan of Star Trek can quote the intro to the classic sci-fi TV series: "To go boldly where no man has gone before." Fifty-seven years after the series ended, SpaceX is making fiction a reality. The space technology pioneer founded by Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk is also going where no other company has gone before. SpaceX plans to list its shares on the NASDAQ stock exchange with a reported valuation of around $1.75 trillion, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is preparing for its IPO with a projected valuation of $1.75 trillion, potentially becoming the largest IPO in history.
• Starlink generated $11.4 billion in revenue in the past year, representing approximately 60% of SpaceX's total revenue.
• SpaceX estimates its total addressable market (TAM) at $28.5 trillion, with $22.7 trillion related to enterprise applications.
• There is significant skepticism regarding the $28.5 trillion TAM figure, and other AI companies are expected to compete in the space.
• Investor perception of SpaceX's future business, similar to Tesla, will heavily influence its valuation.
news.Keywords: IPO, Valuation, Total Addressable Market (TAM), Starlink, AI

news.Title: KLA Flags Stronger Chip Equipment Demand, Rare 2027 Visibility at JPMorgan Conference

Higgins said 2027 wafer fab equipment growth should outpace 2026. Advanced packaging is becoming a major growth driver , with KLA now seeing the market growing above 30% and its own packaging ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Wafer fab equipment spending is projected to exceed $140 billion this year, with potential upside into 2026.
• The company has unusually strong visibility into 2027, driven by new fab construction and customer urgency.

• KLA expects its second-half performance to improve significantly, potentially 15-20% higher than the first half.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor equipment, Wafer fab, Advanced packaging, Demand outlook, Revenue growth

news.Title: Ferrari Falls After Disappointing Reviews of First Electric Car
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Ferrari NV shares fell almost 8% in Milan after the Italian super-car maker unveiled the Luce, its first fully electric vehicle, marking a sharp setback for one of the industry’s most closely watched EV debuts. Most Read from Bloomberg Nvidia CEO Urges Super Micro to Tighten Up on Compliance Trump Doctor Visit Renews Health Scrutiny as 80th Birthday Nears Trump Says He’ll Announce Negotiated Deal With Iran Shortly Rubio Sees Good News Coming on Hormuz as Iran Talks Continue US, Iran Inch Toward Deal as Gaps Remain on Uranium, Sanctions The drop shows the challenge Ferrari is facing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Ferrari's shares dropped nearly 8% following disappointing reviews of its first electric vehicle, the Luce.
• The design of the Luce was criticized for being too similar to other EVs like Tesla models and was compared unfavorably to a Honda Accord EV and Tesla 3.
• The launch faces challenges as demand for high-end EVs becomes unpredictable, with rivals like Lamborghini and Porsche slowing electrification plans.
• Ferrari's 2030 plan has been revised, reducing the target for fully electric cars to 20% of the lineup.
• The Luce, priced at €550,000, is a critical test for Ferrari to balance exclusivity and emotional appeal with electrification.
news.Keywords: EV debut, luxury automotive, electrification strategy, brand perception, market demand

news.Title: 川普喊造美積電？ 半導體老將霸氣嗆「門都沒有」 揭台積電無敵護城河真相
news.Content: 美國總統川普頻頻喊話，希望將台灣半導體產能大舉移往美國，引發全球科技圈關注。不過，擁有超過45年半導體資歷的昇陽半導體董事長梁明成近日直言，台灣真正的優勢從來不只是台積電，而是 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 半導體老將梁明成指出，台灣半導體產業的優勢在於由台積電領軍的完整供應鏈生態系，而非僅單一公司。
• 他強調，此種「螞蟻雄兵」模式需數十年累積，非其他國家短期內能複製，並認為將台積電變成「美積電」不可能。
• 梁明成提到，台積電在先進製程良率及先進封裝技術上遙遙領先競爭對手，對手已望塵莫及。
• 他分析，台灣掌握AI晶片製造與基礎建設兩大核心，在AI時代的重要性只會提升。
news.Keywords: 供應鏈, 生態系, 技術領先, AI核心, 產業聚落

news.Title: This Is the Quantum Computing Stock I'd Buy Before Any Other Right Now
news.Content: Quantum computing is very much a story of the future, as companies are still building out the technology needed to turn possibilities into realities. Those possibilities, however, remain very promising, as quantum computers could solve problems in minutes that conventional computers would take 1,000 years or longer. So how do you set yourself up to be at the right place at the right time while also avoiding ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) is positioned as a pick-and-shovel investment in the burgeoning quantum computing sector.
• Amazon Braket, launched in 2019, and the development of the Ocelot quantum chip are key initiatives.
• The quantum computing market is projected to grow from over $1 billion in 2025 to $4.4 billion by 2028, with potential for $2.7 trillion in global economic value by 2035.
• Amazon offers a less risky entry into quantum computing compared to pure-play companies, leveraging its existing profitability and infrastructure.

news.Title: 3 Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Buy in June as the Dow Jones Industrial Average Turns 130
news.Content: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) is one of the oldest and most globally recognized stock market indexes in the world. Established by Charles Dow on May 26, 1896, the index celebrates its 130th anniversary today. But the Dow's composition has changed dramatically over time. There are only 30 Dow components, compared to hundreds in the S&P 500 and thousands in the Nasdaq Composite . With so few seats, each Dow member effectively serves as a representative of a stock market sector. The components have changed to mirror the evolving economy, with the addition of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is highlighted as a top Dow growth stock, with its dividend payout increasing by 2,400% to $1 per share annually.
• The surge in AI demand is transforming Nvidia's business model, making it less cyclical through rack-scale solutions and software platforms like CUDA.
• Nvidia's first-quarter fiscal 2027 earnings report showed record sales and surging data center revenue, indicating continued AI spending.
• Intel (INTC) was mentioned as a component that has been removed from the Dow Jones Industrial Average.
news.Keywords: AI revolution, data center, dividend growth, cyclicality reduction, foundational technology

news.Title: Meet the Company Taking on SpaceX and Tesla -- It Could Be Worth More Than Both Combined by 2027
news.Content: There's a growing expectation that Elon Musk will eventually combine all his businesses under a single entity. Earlier this year, he oversaw the merger of SpaceX and xAI, the latter of which had previously acquired his social media company, X (formerly Twitter). The next step of combining SpaceX and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) may be a bit more difficult, but it's still well within reason. Musk further strengthened the tie between the two companies earlier this year with the launch of their Terafab joint venture , which aims to make custom chips for both companies' artificial intelligence (AI) endeavors. Will AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article discusses the potential for Amazon to surpass the combined market capitalization of SpaceX and Tesla by 2027.
• Amazon's market cap is currently $2.85 trillion, with SpaceX projected at $1.75 trillion and Tesla at $1.6 trillion.
• Amazon's growth drivers include double-digit revenue growth in retail, expanding operating margins from logistics improvements, and high-margin Prime subscriptions and advertising.
• AWS is experiencing accelerating revenue growth, partly due to custom AI chips (Trainium) improving operating margins, and faces competition from SpaceX.
• Both SpaceX and Tesla are valued based on future potential rather than current financial results, unlike Amazon's core businesses.
news.Keywords: market cap, revenue growth, operating margin, cloud computing, AI endeavors

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】IC設計大廠聯發科(2454)今日宣布與電子紙供應商元太科技(8069)將深化合作，透過整合聯發科全球首款專為生成式AI電子閱讀器打造的系統單晶片（SoC）與內建硬體時序控制 ...

news.Content: 台股今（26）日早盤持續衝高、越過44,000點大關再創歷史新高，隨後拉回高檔震盪，台積電（2330）盤中跌幅逾1％，然聯發科（2454）上漲約2％與台達電（2308 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日早盤衝高至44,000點創歷史新高後拉回震盪，台積電盤中下跌，但聯發科與台達電上漲，成功引導資金在電子權值股間良性輪動。
• 被動元件族群如國巨、大毅、禾伸堂因股價飆高遭列處置股，市場資金轉向基期較低的電子權值股或傳產龍頭。
• 盤中資金轉向PCB載板如欣興、臻鼎-KY與記憶體族群，顯示市場風險偏好仍高，資金在電子股內部進行低基期輪動。
• 記憶體封測廠力成受惠於AMD AI先進封裝與HBM需求，已連續拉出四根漲停板，帶動半導體封測相關供應鏈買氣。
• 分析師認為今日成交量約1.4兆至1.5兆元，並未出現失控的極端暴量，盤中拉回屬於高檔正常獲利調節，非多頭行情終結。
news.Keywords: 資金輪動,權值股,記憶體族群,被動元件,獲利調節

news.Title: 穎崴探針年底月產900萬支，明年看1400萬，擬前進亞歷桑那或達拉斯設廠
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】針對外資點出穎崴(6515)探針產能不足，穎崴董座王嘉煌透露，今年年 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 穎崴董事長王嘉煌透露，今年底月產能將達900萬支探針，明年預計達1400萬支。
• 老化測試部分預計第四季會有較大訂單量，明年後續的functional burn in需求量大。
• 穎崴規劃前進美國設廠，潛在地點包括台積電所在的亞利桑那州，以及特斯拉計劃設廠的德州達拉斯。
• 公司預計明年第二季新廠開始量產，以因應美國加快建立半導體產能的需求。
news.Keywords: 探針產能,老化測試,美國設廠,半導體供應鏈,擴產計畫

news.Title: 世芯：未來動能看好　ASIC成長將比GPU更強
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中台北2026年5月26日電）特殊應用晶片（ASIC）廠世芯-KY (3661 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 特殊應用晶片(ASIC)廠世芯-KY董事長沈翔霖表示，公司最艱難時刻已過，看好未來營運動能。
• 預期ASIC因具備成本效益和差異化，未來有機會取代部分GPU市場，ASIC成長動能將比GPU更強。
• 去年營收下滑至309.26億元，年減逾4成，主因是少了一個世代產品接續。
• 世芯-KY持續推動3奈米與2奈米先進製程設計，布局超大規模雲端服務業者、客製化系統及AI新創企業等市場，並積極擴展北美及東南亞市場。
news.Keywords: ASIC,GPU,營運動能,先進製程,市場布局

news.Title: 台股市值狂飆超車印度！彭博曝總規模衝上全球第5名 關鍵全靠台積電
news.Content:
財經中心／綜合報導

台灣股市在「護國神山」 台積電 狂飆帶動下，總市值於25日正式超車印度，搶下全球第5大股市寶座。彭博 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 在台積電的帶動下，台灣股市總市值於25日達到4.95兆美元，超越印度成為全球第五大股市。
• 台積電佔台股總市值超過42%，是此波成長的關鍵推手，受惠於AI浪潮與半導體強勁需求。
• 目前台股規模僅次於美國、中國、日本及香港。
• 彭博報導指出，台積電的股價漲勢猛烈，直接拉抬了台股的整體表現。
news.Keywords: 股市市值,全球排名,台積電,AI浪潮,半導體需求

news.Title: 台股正式超車印度，躍升全球第五大市場！彭博：「台積電條款」鬆綁，外資瘋砍印度奔向台灣
news.Content: 台灣股市憑藉「護國神山」台積電在AI晶片領域的絕對優勢，總市值在2026年5月正式達到4.95兆美元，取代印度成為全球第五大股票市場。《彭博新聞》分析，除了台積電今年飆漲近五成，加上金管會放寬基金投資單一股票上限，吸引百億 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台灣股市總市值達到4.95兆美元，超越印度成為全球第五大股票市場，主因是台積電在AI晶片領域的優勢。
• 彭博分析指出，台積電今年股價飆漲近五成，加上金管會放寬基金投資單一股票上限，吸引資金湧入。
• 印度股市因缺乏AI概念股、高通膨及外資撤離，市值滑落至4.92兆美元。
• 台積電在台灣加權股價指數的權重高達42%，是推升台股市值的主要動力。
• 金管會放寬基金投資單一股票上限的「台積電條款」，預計吸引超過60億美元資金流入台股。
news.Keywords: 股市市值,全球排名,台積電,AI晶片,資金流入

news.Title: 木頭姊積極加碼AI新創Cerebras 砍RKLB、AMD
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-26 12:28:45 郭妍希 發佈

明星基金經理人凱薩琳伍德(Cathie Wood、台灣稱木頭姊)掌管的方舟投資(Ark Invest)上週對投資組合積極再平衡，在減碼超微(AMD)、台積電(2330) A ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 方舟投資(Ark Invest)近期進行投資組合再平衡，減碼了超微(AMD)和台積電(2330) ADR等晶片股。
• 資金轉而投入AI晶片新創商Cerebras Systems Inc.，並大幅加碼加密貨幣交易所Bullish。
• 方舟也增持了京東物流、Archer Aviation和Joby Aviation等公司股票，並小幅加碼輝達及特斯拉。
• 減碼幅度較大的個股包括Roku Inc.、Rocket Lab (RKLB.US)、超微(AMD)、泰瑞達(Teradyne)及台積電ADR。
news.Keywords: 投資組合再平衡, AI新創, 減碼晶片股, 方舟投資, 資金流向

news.Title: 台股衝破4萬4！他驚「擦鞋童秒變擦鞋董」網笑：時代早就不同
news.Content: 台股又創歷史新高！自今年年初已大漲逾14000點，今（26）日更是首度衝破44000點大關，雖然盤中受賣壓影響一度下挫289點，後續跌幅收斂至平盤附近 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股今日衝破44000點大關，創下歷史新高，顯示市場信心依然強勁。
• 有網友質疑傳統的「擦鞋童理論」是否已不適用於當前資訊爆炸的時代，因為即使市場熱絡，指數仍持續飆升。
• 許多網友認為，AI時代的來臨和市場效率的提升，使得舊有理論的參考價值降低。
• 部分網友幽默回應，認為現在的投資者賺錢能力已遠超過去，甚至能開鞋店請擦鞋童。
news.Keywords: 台股新高, 擦鞋童理論, 市場效率, AI時代, 投資熱潮

news.Title: AI伺服器需求爆發　台積電目標價上調、聯發科直逼6000元
news.Content: AI熱潮持續延燒，台股昨（25）日收盤創新高，在 台積電 （2330）與 聯發科 （2454）等主要權值股領軍下穩站43000點，其中台積電大漲55元、收2310元；聯發科則攻上漲停、收4245元，外資近期 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠於AI伺服器需求爆發，外資調升台積電(2330)目標價至3000元，預估2030年營收貢獻可達441億美元。
• 瑞銀預計全球伺服器CPU市場將高速成長，年複合成長率達30%，台積電將是最大受惠者。
• 里昂證券將聯發科(2454)目標價上調至5922元，因其被Google定位為下一代TPU策略核心，預估2028年營收貢獻可達360億美元。
• 台股昨日收盤創新高，在台積電與聯發科等權值股領軍下穩站43000點。
news.Keywords: AI伺服器需求, 目標價上調, 晶圓代工龍頭, TPU策略核心, 權值股領軍

news.Title: 台股熱潮延燒校園！學生請假理由寫「去證券行開戶」 老師秒准
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者藍彥欣／綜合報導

台股近日頻創新高，投資熱潮也一路燒進校園。東海大學一名學生在請假單上，直接把理由寫成「要去 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股頻創新高，投資熱潮延燒至校園，東海大學有學生請假理由竟是「要去證券行開戶」，獲老師准假。
• 此現象引發PTT股板熱議，網友質疑「擦鞋童理論」是否已失效，因市場熱度持續升高但指數未見反轉。
• 有網友認為，現代市場資訊流通快速，舊有理論參考價值降低，AI浪潮更是推升了股市表現。
• 討論中出現兩派看法，有人認為無腦多者可能獲利，也有人認為現在進場投資並不可怕。
news.Keywords: 校園投資熱, 擦鞋童理論失效, 資訊爆炸時代, AI浪潮, 市場氛圍變化

news.Title: 台股矽晶圓、功率半導及金控股適時表態、台股44000點近關情怯
news.Content: 【財訊快報／方亞申】經過週一台股大漲後，週二日股拉回，台股也是開高走低震盪，權值股中僅聯發科(2454)、台達電(2308)、欣興(3037)、富邦金(2881)小漲，其他大都拉回；電子次族群的被動元件也因為被關禁閉大都走低 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股週二呈現開高走低震盪格局，權值股表現分歧，但矽晶圓、功率半導體及金控股有表現，指數在平盤附近震盪。
• 受惠於美伊戰爭結束與否的拉鋸，國際原油價格回落，但聯準會降息預期仍存疑。
• AI伺服器升級帶動零組件需求，英特爾及AMD股價有望持續向上，全球股市表現強勢，台股、韓股、費半及日股為今年強勢股市。
• 被動元件族群因分盤交易拉回，但部分個股仍強勢；ABF載板、設備股、矽晶圓、IC設計及封測族群表現輪動良好。
• 金控股表現穩健，富邦金創高，支撐指數表現。
news.Keywords: 台股,權值股,AI伺服器,半導體,金控股

news.Title: 世芯-KY：3奈米恐比記憶體還缺，與台積合作成關鍵
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-26 11:54:12 黃立安 發佈

ASIC設計服務業者世芯-KY(3661)今(26)日召開股東常會，董事長沈翔霖(附圖)表示，目前3奈 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 世芯-KY董事長沈翔霖表示，目前3奈米需求相當吃緊，認為比記憶體還缺，與台積電(2330)的合作關係對先進製程產能調配至關重要。
• 全球對3奈米需求強勁，是業界擔憂的環節之一，世芯-KY能否解除產能瓶頸，與台積電的合作是關鍵。
• 公司對未來營收成長維持高度信心，最重要的客戶已重新回來，不論是既有design或下世代專案都有信心。
• 世芯-KY的核心優勢在於設計服務能力，專注於AI加速器與CPU等高階運算晶片設計案，並認為ASIC的客製化優勢逐漸浮現。
• 預期今年營收動能自第二季增溫，第三季起營收與獲利可望有強勁季增表現，全年營收結構呈現「下半年爆發」態勢；2奈米專案預計年底完成tape-out。
news.Keywords: ASIC,3奈米,台積電,AI加速器,營收成長

news.Title: Before the Next Nvidia-Style Run, Here Are 3 AI Stocks Worth Watching
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been one of the biggest beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence (AI) boom. Shares have already soared by more than 1,300% in the past five years. However, the next big AI stock gains may come from less obvious players. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » As AI infrastructure spending expands, demand is rising not just for AI chips but also for high-speed connectivity technologies that enable the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Astera Labs (ALAB) is highlighted as a potential next big AI stock, specializing in high-speed connectivity chips for data centers.
• Astera Labs reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue growth of 93% year-over-year to $308.4 million, with adjusted EPS up 84.8%.
• The company expects Q2 revenue to increase 15%-18% sequentially and anticipates its Scorpio switch family to become its largest product line by the end of 2026.
• Marvell Technology (MRVL) designs custom AI chips and networking products, with projected fiscal 2027 revenue growth over 30% to nearly $11 billion, and fiscal 2028 revenue of $15 billion.
• Nvidia invested $2 billion in Marvell, underscoring the strategic value of its semi-custom chips and optical networking capabilities for AI infrastructure.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, connectivity chips, data center, revenue growth, EPS growth

news.Title: 高價股氣勢轉弱？台股52檔千金股同框  力旺跳水逾7%股王股后齊熄火
news.Content: 台股今（26）日延續多頭攻勢，資金持續回流電子權值與題材族群，推升指數再度改寫歷史新高，千金俱樂部也擴增 ...

• 然而，個股走勢出現明顯分歧，股王信驊(5274)及股后穎崴(6515)股價疲弱下跌，力旺(3529)盤中重挫逾7%。
• 晶圓雙雄、環球晶等電子權值股領軍，結合記憶體、IC設計、矽智財、AI及低軌衛星族群齊揚，金融與傳產同步走強。
• 創新服務(7828)、弘塑(3131)、奇鋐(3017)等個股同步走強。
• 股王信驊、股后穎崴股價翻黑下跌，力旺賣壓沉重。
news.Keywords: 台股,千金股,高價股,個股分歧,AI概念股

news.Title: 台股衝上全球第六大　龔明鑫：這不是泡沫，是台灣國力正在改變

news.Title: 歷史性的一刻 台股超越印度、躍全球第5大股市

在全球晶片代工龍頭台積電(2330)連續數日跳漲的帶動下，台灣股市的總市值已正式超越印度。

彭博社26日 報導 ，截至週一(5月25日)，台灣股市的總市值已爬升至4.9 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• AI算力應用已從聊天機器人轉向AI代理與推理模型，對晶片需求呈指數級增長。
news.Keywords: 市值,AI硬體,晶片製造,供應鏈,市場排名

news.Title: 龔明鑫：企業投資看重效率 台灣建廠速度世界第一
news.Content: （中央社記者曾筠庭台北2026年5月26日電）經濟部長龔明鑫今天表示，隨著AI需求爆發，包括美光科技等國際大廠持續擴大在台投資，企業最重視的其實並非電價等成本，而是行政效率。在全球供應鏈重組趨勢下，台灣不僅具備高良率 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 經濟部長龔明鑫表示，企業在台投資看重行政效率而非電價成本，台灣建廠速度為世界第一。
• 美光等國際大廠持續擴大在台投資，關鍵在於台灣高行政效率能快速回應AI產業需求。
• 台積電在台灣的工業用電價格甚至高於日本熊本，但仍持續擴大投資，主因行政流程順暢與建廠速度快。
• 政府預計至2032-2034年電力需求與供給無虞，並將強化電網韌性。
• 今年前4月外銷訂單優於去年，傳統產業接單改善，導入AI的業者營運表現明顯提升。
news.Keywords: 行政效率,建廠速度,AI需求,供應鏈重組,電力韌性

news.Title: The 1 AI Stock I'd Put in a Time Capsule and Open in 2036
news.Content: If I had to pick one artificial intelligence (AI) stock to buy today, bury in a time capsule, and not peek at again until 2036, I wouldn't choose a chip designer or a model-maker. I wouldn't choose Nvidia , Nebius Group , or any other sexy, hot name right now. Those businesses are great, but they operate in a world where the technology frontier shifts every year and competition is relentless. The one I'd pick is a company quietly trying to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Absci Corp. (ABSI) is identified as a potential long-term AI investment, focusing on generative AI for drug discovery.
• Absci's platform uses generative AI to design protein-based drugs in silico before lab testing, combining deep learning with wet lab validation.
• The company has strategic partnerships with major players like Merck, PrecisionLife, and Owkin, indicating strong industry validation.
• Absci is also developing its own pipeline of AI-designed biologic drug candidates, aiming for potential royalty or product economics.
• The article contrasts Absci's long-term, technology-driven approach with the faster-shifting, competitive landscape of chip designers and model-makers like Nvidia.
news.Keywords: generative AI, drug discovery, AI platform, biopharmaceutical, R&D partnership

news.Content: 台股今年以來勢如破竹，狂飆逾1萬4千點，這股全民瘋股市的熱潮也一路吹進校園，不僅有學生請假理由大剌剌寫著「要去證券商開戶」，還出現年輕族群「借貸買 ETF」的極端現象，聯邦投信總經理莊雅晴提醒，借貸買月月配ETF，每個月幫自 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 年輕人借貸搶進台股，甚至借貸買月配息ETF，每月看似多領5000元，但風險可能更大。

news.Title: AI just minted 19 new billionaires worth $59 billion
news.Content: Money has a way of finding the people building tomorrow's tools before the rest of us notice. That was true in the dotcom boom, in the smartphone era, and again in the social media land grab a decade later. The AI boom looks different, at least so far. For the last three years, almost every story about artificial intelligence wealth has pointed to the same handful of names. Jensen Huang at Nvidia ( NVDA ). Sam Altman at OpenAI. Mark Zuckerberg pouring tens of billions into Meta Platforms' ( META ) compute build. The "AI rich" looked like the same ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI boom has created 19 new billionaires in the past year, adding $59.3 billion in wealth, bringing the total AI billionaires to 60.
• Cerebras Systems' IPO, the year's largest, created two new billionaires and valued the AI chipmaker at roughly $67 billion at the open.
• Many new AI billionaires are not building foundation models but are applying AI to industries like law, healthcare, and software development.
• These newcomers often focus on software built on top of existing models or apply AI to established workflows, differing from the 'old guard' of chipmakers and model builders.
• The article notes the diverse backgrounds of these new billionaires, highlighting a shift from traditional tech pedigrees to application-focused innovation.
news.Keywords: AI wealth creation, startup IPO, AI applications, market valuation, billionaire emergence

news.Title: Taiwan Overtakes India as World's Fifth-Largest Stock Market
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Taiwan overtook India in stock market value, powered mainly by a breakneck rally in the world’s largest chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Most Read from Bloomberg Nvidia CEO Urges Super Micro to Tighten Up on Compliance Trump Doctor Visit Renews Health Scrutiny as 80th Birthday Nears ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan has surpassed India to become the world's fifth-largest stock market, with a market capitalization of $4.95 trillion.
• This rise is primarily driven by Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC), which accounts for over 42% of the benchmark index.
• TSMC shares have rallied 49% this year, benefiting from the AI trade and its dominant position in semiconductor manufacturing.
• The article highlights two key market themes: surging oil prices impacting energy-importing nations like India, and AI optimism benefiting tech hubs like Taiwan.
• New regulations in Taiwan allow domestic funds to increase their investment limit in single stocks, potentially driving further inflows to TSMC.
news.Keywords: market capitalization, semiconductor manufacturing, AI trade, market concentration, fund inflows

news.Title: Veteran investor names the next 'NVIDIA' before AI boom
news.Content: Veteran investor and Bitwise advisor Jeffrey Park has identified what he believes could become the next " NVIDIA ,” highlighting growing investor appetite for the next breakout technology play. Park wrote a long X post on May 24, in which he pointed to crypto as a technology that is bound to surge, drawing comparisons to NVIDIA before its meteoric rise during the artificial intelligence (AI) boom. The call ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Veteran investor Jeffrey Park compares the current state of crypto to NVIDIA's position before the AI boom, suggesting crypto could be the next major breakout technology play.
• Park draws parallels between the early development of AI infrastructure, subsidized by gamers, and the current groundwork being laid by early DeFi users.
• He uses Elon Musk's 'middle game' analogy for urban driving to describe the complex transition phase crypto is currently in, facing challenges like regulatory uncertainty and compliance norms.
• Park differentiates between Bitcoin as a monetary experiment and crypto as a technological experiment, believing both can coexist and evolve.
• The article suggests that despite current obstacles, the problems facing crypto adoption are fundamentally solvable, similar to how NVIDIA's foundational technologies were developed over decades.
news.Keywords: crypto adoption, technological inflection point, AI parallels, regulatory uncertainty, market transition

news.Title: 5-star analysts reset Marvell stock price target ahead of earnings
news.Content: Marvell ( MRVL ) stock closed the May 22 trading session at $196.33. The stock has rallied 131% year to date, by Sunday morning, May 24. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index ( SPY ) is up about 9% in the same period. The company has outpaced the S&P 500, thanks to its participation in the broader semiconductor rally driven by the AI boom. Positive news driving Marvell's stock includes: Strong fourth quarter (Q4) earnings report in March. Amazon's extension of its partnership with Anthropic . Marvell’s acquisition ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Marvell Technology (MRVL) stock has rallied 131% year-to-date, significantly outperforming the S&P 500, driven by its participation in the AI semiconductor rally.
• Positive catalysts include a strong Q4 earnings report, Amazon's extended partnership with Anthropic, Marvell's acquisition of Polariton Technologies, and Intel's earnings boosting sector confidence.
• Analysts from Citi and Stifel have raised Marvell's price targets to $215 and $210 respectively, reiterating 'buy' ratings ahead of its Q1 fiscal 2027 earnings report.
• These upgrades are based on strong demand for Amazon's AI accelerators and Marvell's expected Q1 revenue of $2.4 billion +/- 5%.
• Bank of America and Goldman Sachs also raised their sales and EPS estimates for Marvell, reflecting optimism in its AI data center sales growth.
news.Keywords: semiconductor rally, AI data center, earnings estimates, price target, revenue growth

news.Title: NVIDIA (NVDA): The Best High Growth Stock to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade
news.Content: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of the 15 High Growth Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade . On May 20, 2026, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang said the company has “largely conceded” China’s AI chip market to Huawei ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.87 and revenue of $81.6B, exceeding consensus estimates.
• CEO Jensen Huang stated that NVIDIA has largely conceded the China AI chip market to Huawei due to U.S. export restrictions.
• Demand in China remains significant, with Huawei performing strongly.
• Raymond James raised NVIDIA's price target to $330 from $323 and maintained a Strong Buy rating, citing stronger-than-expected Q1 results and Q2 guidance driven by inference-led growth and market share gains.

news.Keywords: earnings, AI chips, China market, export restrictions, buyback

news.Title: Is Nvidia the Most Underrated Dividend Growth Stock to Own?
news.Content: When you think of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) , dividends probably aren't one of the things that come to mind. But given just how much the company generates in earnings and how much room it has to grow its dividend, that could change in the future. Apple and Microsoft are ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) recently announced a significant dividend increase of 2,400%, raising its quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share, resulting in an annual yield of approximately 0.47%.
• This new yield is higher than Apple's (0.35%) and closer to Microsoft's (0.87%), though still below the S&P 500 average (1.1%).
• Despite robust earnings ($2.39 diluted EPS in the last quarter), Nvidia's dividend increase might be aimed at aligning with peers rather than signaling a shift to a primary dividend growth strategy.
• Tech companies like Apple and Microsoft typically prioritize share buybacks over substantial dividend increases to maintain flexibility for growth.
• Nvidia is primarily considered a growth stock, with the majority of returns expected from share price appreciation rather than dividend income.
news.Keywords: dividend increase, shareholder return, growth stock, share buybacks, dividend yield

news.Title: Why SoundHound's Oasys Platform Could Be a Game Changer for Its Business
news.Content: SoundHound AI (NASDAQ: SOUN) has struggled to convince investors it's a top growth stock to own. Despite some strong top-line growth, the stock has declined by 18% so far this year, and it's down more than 63% from its 52-week high of $22.17. The voice artificial intelligence (AI) ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SoundHound AI (SOUN) is struggling to convince investors despite strong top-line growth, with its stock down 18% year-to-date and over 63% from its 52-week high.
• The company's new Oasys platform, described as the 'world's first self-learning orchestrated agentic AI platform,' could be a key growth driver.
• Oasys allows customers to create and deploy conversational AI agents across various channels, with self-improvement capabilities.
• SoundHound reported Q1 2026 revenue up 52% to $44.2 billion and projects full-year revenue growth of approximately 44% to $225-$260 million.
• A major challenge is profitability, with an operating loss of $200.5 million over the trailing 12 months, making it a potentially volatile investment despite its growth potential.
news.Keywords: agentic AI, Oasys platform, revenue growth, operating loss, stock volatility

news.Title: Recursion Pharmaceuticals Just Hit a 52-Week Low. Is This Former Nvidia Holding a Smart Buy Now?
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) is slowly reshaping how industries, including healthcare, operate. Various companies are looking to implement AI tools in the sector to boost efficiency and productivity while cutting costs. Recursion Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: RXRX) is doing so specifically within the biotech niche, but the company's efforts haven't been rewarded by the market, at least so far. Recursion Pharmaceuticals' shares have significantly underperformed broader equities over the past ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Recursion Pharmaceuticals (RXRX) has hit a 52-week low, underperforming broader equities.
• The company utilizes an AI-powered operating system to accelerate drug discovery and clinical trial efficiency.
• RXRX has partnerships with major drugmakers like Roche, Sanofi, and Bayer, and previously had an investment from NVIDIA.
• Despite innovative approaches and partnerships, RXRX has shown little tangible evidence of success, with no products on the market and no candidates in late-stage studies.
• The stock remains a speculative bet, with potential for a turnaround contingent on significant clinical and regulatory progress.
news.Keywords: biotech, AI, drug discovery, clinical trials, speculative investment

AI瘋狂浪潮完全沒有停下來的跡象，多頭買盤大舉追捧台灣兩大晶片巨頭！台股昨日（25日）在AI行情引爆下上演史詩級暴漲，台積電（2330）終場狂飆55元至2310元，聯發科（2454）更在買單瘋狂湧入下直 ...

news.Title: Why Microsoft's Split With OpenAI May Be Great for the Stock in the Long Run
news.Content: Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) and OpenAI aren't as close and intertwined as they were a year ago. While they still work together, both have been distancing themselves from one another and have updated their partnership agreement multiple times. While partnering and working closely with OpenAI may have seemed like ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's (MSFT) partnership with OpenAI has evolved, with both entities distancing themselves.
• A more agnostic approach to AI models, allowing customers to choose from various options (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source) on Microsoft's cloud servers, is seen as a long-term strategic advantage.
• Over 10,000 customers have used multiple AI models on Foundry, with significant growth in usage of Anthropic and OpenAI models.
• Microsoft's stock has fallen 13% this year, but AI integration, like the Copilot assistant, enhances its products and services.
• Trading at 25 times trailing earnings, MSFT is considered reasonably valued, and reduced dependence on OpenAI positions it well for AI business growth.
news.Keywords: AI strategy, multi-model approach, cloud services, enterprise AI, valuation

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: The 'Next Nvidia' Trade? Why Investors Are Suddenly Watching Advanced Micro Devices, Arm Holdings, and Marvell Technology
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been a pioneer in artificial intelligence (AI) over the past few years. The massive parallel computational power of its graphics processing units (GPUs) has made its chips ideal for training large language models (LLMs). What's worth noting is that Nvidia continues to dominate the AI chip market after all these years, controlling an estimated 80% of this space. However, Nvidia stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA dominates the AI chip market with an estimated 80% share, but its stock has lagged peers.
• Investors are shifting focus to Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), Arm Holdings (ARM), and Marvell Technology (MRVL) for potential AI infrastructure growth.
• AMD, Marvell, and Arm are gaining traction with chips designed for inference-focused AI workloads, which are projected to account for two-thirds of AI computing power.
• AMD expects the server CPU market to grow 35% annually through 2030 and is gaining share from Intel.
• Arm's chip designs are in high demand for their energy efficiency, with projected revenue growth to $25 billion in five years, while Marvell benefits from the shift towards ASICs in AI data centers.
news.Keywords: AI chips, market share, inference workloads, server CPUs, ASICs

news.Title: 台積電重返2300元點燃AI大軍！「12檔概念股」集體噴發　漢唐飆新天價、日月光直接鎖漲停

news.Title: Wedbush analyst has bold IMAX stock message for investors
news.Content: IMAX Corporation ( IMAX ) shareholders had the kind of Friday that rewrites a year. Shares of the premium cinema technology company jumped about 15% on May 22, closing at $39.12, after The Wall Street Journal reported the company is exploring a sale and has approached entertainment companies as potential buyers. The move erased IMAX's year-to-date losses in a single session. It also forced Wall Street to do something it usually avoids on a Friday: rethink an entire thesis before the weekend. That's where Wedbush analyst Alicia Reese came in. Wedbush's pick of the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IMAX Corporation shares jumped 15% on May 22 following a report that the company is exploring a sale.
• Wedbush analyst Alicia Reese identified private equity, Netflix, Apple, and Sony as likely buyers, maintaining an Outperform rating and $46 price target.
• A studio owner acquiring IMAX could compromise its neutrality, making private equity a preferred buyer.
• Apple could use IMAX as a theatrical platform for Apple TV+ content, while Netflix's thin theatrical slate avoids conflicts.
• IMAX reported its strongest year in 2025 with record global box office and system signings, and first-quarter revenue was $81.4 million, ahead of estimates.
news.Keywords: M&A, potential acquisition, entertainment technology, analyst rating, box office performance

news.Title: Is the Palantir Valuation Debate Over? Why Some Analysts See 86% Upside in the Agentic AI Era.
news.Content: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) develops custom artificial intelligence (AI) software for government and commercial customers across various industries and applications. The company's launch of its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) in 2023 has proven to be a game changer, with growth accelerating consistently since then amid insatiable demand for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Palantir Technologies (PLTR) is experiencing accelerated growth driven by its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP), with management guiding for 120% revenue growth from U.S. commercial customers in 2026.
• The stock has risen over 2,000% since 2023, but its valuation remains a subject of debate among analysts.
• Agentic AI is expected to drive future growth, with AI agents functioning within Palantir's software to monitor and coordinate tasks.
• The Enterprise Agentic AI market is projected to grow over 46% annually, reaching $24.5 billion by 2030.
• Despite trading at 67 times sales and 155 times earnings, analysts project earnings growth of over 50% annually for the next three to five years, justifying the valuation if hypergrowth continues.
news.Keywords: AI platform, agentic AI, valuation, revenue growth, enterprise software

news.Title: 主動式ETF大換股！不只台積電列標配「另5檔也獲法人高度共識」瑤池金母還重點加碼6檔AI
news.Content:
主動式ETF（台股基金）已上演換股大秀，在28檔被過半數基金納入核心的個股中，更有6檔個股實力極強，成為全體經理人共同押寶的「全體標配股」，這些「標配股」集中在先進製程、AI伺服器、高階網通、散熱及銅箔基板領域等。

主動式ETF共同標配有6檔，其集結了「AI伺服器供應鏈核心」、「產業龍頭地位」與「強勁獲利動能」三大優勢，是經理人創造打敗大盤超額報酬（Alpha）的必備工具，包括台積電（2630）、智邦（2345）、金像電（2368）、台光電（2383）、貿聯-KY（3665）、旺矽（6223）等。

台積電是全球晶圓代工絕對龍頭，通吃所有AI晶片代工與高階封裝（CoWoS）訂單，是台股無可替代的護國神山；智邦受惠AI算力爆發帶動資料中心升級，其800G交換器出貨量全球領先，是AI網路通訊基礎建設的最大贏家。

金像電是高階AI伺服器PCB（印刷電路板）核心供應商，技術壁壘高，在伺服器板市佔率穩居全球前列；台光電為AI伺服器必備的高階CCL（銅箔基板）龍頭，獨佔主要AI晶片基板供應，毛利率與獲利能力極強。

貿聯-KY是輝達（Nvidia）AI伺服器高階線束與連接器主要供應商，具備高度客製化能力，受惠於新世代架構；旺矽受惠AI與HPC（高效能運算）晶片爆發，帶動懸臂式（CPC）與垂直式（VPC）探針卡需求，測試介面產能供不應求。

主動式經理人不複製指數趨勢，追求超額報酬，上述6檔股票在2026年皆具備極高的盈餘成長率（EPS Growth），必須具備極佳基本面且充足流動性，在外資與投信法人中具有高度共識，易形成「籌碼鎖定」效應。

此外，有「瑤池金母」加持的主動統一台股增長（00981A）近期換股也備受矚目，其5月20日至25日期間重點加碼名單有漢唐（2404）、頎邦（6147）、金像電、嘉澤（3533）、奇鋐（3017）、南電（8046）等。

news.Title: 台股迎「4萬3」 兆豐00996A價量齊揚
news.Content:
【記者柯安聰台北報導】受惠美伊和平協議現曙光、外資熱錢強勢回流激勵，上週五（22日）台股大盤狂飆899點，終場以42267點改寫歷史新高！在市場多頭氣勢如虹之下，兆豐00996A主動ETF同步展現指標性的強勁爆發力，終場大漲4.73%，以波段最高點14.62元作收，單日成交量突破1.4萬張，00996A以靈活調配、精準卡位多頭急先鋒的策略奏效，亮眼的「價量齊揚」行情，成為這波台股上攻行情中備受矚目的投資焦點。台股25日收盤價來到43644.40點，兆豐00996A主動ETF持續刷新新高來到15.26元，成交量更是突破1.6萬張。

兆豐00996A主動ETF投資團隊表示，目前市場資金高度往半導體先進製程與 AI 巨頭集中。兆豐00996A主動ETF自掛牌以來，憑藉動態調整持股的優勢，精準在產業快速輪動中捕捉Alpha。兆豐投信指出，兆豐00996A主動ETF的核心優勢在於「Alpha與Beta雙軌並進」，根據該ETF最新持股策略，目前聚焦於台灣最具國際競爭力的科技核心，前三大產業分別為電子零組件、半導體與電腦週邊，合計佔比達 78%；主要持股精準囊括台積電、臻鼎-KY、聯發科、台光電、國巨*等AI權值龍頭。

兆豐00996A主動ETF投資團隊進一步分析，台股上週五寫下了罕見的「四驚奇」紀錄，顯示多頭動能強勁，包括指數與市值齊創紀錄，大盤收盤點位達42267點與整體市值均改寫歷史新高；再者，電子類股指數衝上2752點，創下歷史新猷；搭配台股市值超過新臺幣兆元的產業巨頭群起增加至18檔；最後，受惠外資強力回補，單日強力回補761.3億元，創下台股史上第4大買超紀錄。

法人分析，台股已正式進入「主升段」行情，兆豐00996A主動ETF由投資團隊依據市場動態與企業競爭力，進行每日即時的汰弱留強。在科技權值股穩軍心、中小股剽悍的熱絡行情中，能有效率地幫助投資人捕捉投資機會。

除了進攻犀利，兆豐00996A主動ETF在防守端同樣展現出「靈活韌性」。兆豐投信提醒，雖然台股連拉兩根中長紅棒，但上週五外資在台指期留倉的淨空單仍高達46483口。對此，兆豐00996A主動ETF在產品設計上特別結合了量化模型與期貨避險機制，一旦大盤在高檔面臨技術性修正或震盪，經理團隊可彈性運用期貨鎖住投資成果、降低淨值波動。

展望後市，在COMPUTEX（台北國際電腦展）有可能即將再度引爆全球AI浪潮前夕，兼具「主動靈活選股」與「Alpha+Beta雙軌並進」的兆豐00996A主動ETF，是投資人多頭行情不缺席、震盪行情更從容的智選配置。（自立電子報2026/5/25）

news.Title: 台股飆升歷史新高　三類ETF上演大驚奇
news.Content:
【記者柯安聰台北報導】內外資金持續回籠，台股再度重返43645.78點新天際線，激勵台股ETF表現勇猛，根據集保統計，截至5/25止，共有6檔台股被動ETF分別在股價、受益人數、零股人數3項同創歷史新高，再締大三元佳績，且主要集中半導體、市值及科技3大類，成為這波台股繼續衝高、行情向上攻堅的最佳重砲型ETF。

根據CMoney統計，截至5/25止，共有60檔台股原型ETF股價創新高，其中，若再觀察各檔ETF受益人數、零股人數成長情形，則有6檔台股ETF強出頭，分別是新光臺灣半導體30、群益半導體收益、中信關鍵半導體等3檔半導體型ETF，以及元大台灣50、野村臺灣新科技50與元大富櫃50等市值及科技型ETF等3檔出線，上述6檔不論在「最新股價」、「受益人數」、「零股人數」都創下歷史新高紀錄，呈現「股價表現靚」、「市場買氣旺」及「小資人氣高」的大三元佳績，成為掌握台股多頭行情的重砲型ETF。

投信法人表示，中東和平曙光在即，加上6月Computex展即將登場，受惠台灣是全球最完整AI產業鏈，吸引外資近期大舉回流台股，台股除重量級電子股表現齊揚外，以半導體股為核心的主被動ETF，有望成為資金追捧的熱門投資標的，建議投資人可擇優布局半導體ETF，鎖定由AI帶動的投資新機會作中長期布局，以免空手錯失這波由AI續領台股飆升的新牛市。

新光臺灣半導體30(00904)ETF經理人黃鈺民表示，輝達最新財報表現亮眼、超微加碼百億投資台廠供應鏈，在６月Computex電腦展前夕，輝達執行長黃仁勳提前4天訪台，關鍵行程將固樁台灣AI供應鏈. 其中，重量級半導體廠更是輝達「兆元宴」座上佳賓，再次凸顯台灣半導體產業鏈在全球AI製造扮演核心地位，台灣半導體供應鏈中，全產業鏈包括晶圓廠投資、到先進封裝與測試快速發展，皆受惠於全球半導體生態系的擴充產能與技術成長需求，不少關鍵半導體元件短期缺貨難解，2027年供不應求持續吃緊，帶旺半導體價格暴漲商機全面擴散，中長期基本面將迎來新一波硬投資成長浪潮。

台新投信建議，AI除硬體基礎設施外，AI應用、機器人發展也是當紅投資顯學，由AI帶動的投資機會，以半導體為最直接受惠族群，建議投資人除挑選個股外，也可依自身風險承受度與現金流需求，鎖定半導體ETF或主動式ETF參與投資，以半導體ETF來看，除每季領息收益外，股價成長潛力更值得期待；若透過零股投資，中長期存股累積下來，資本利得的成長表現亦可觀，可作為中長期參與全球AI成長紅利的投資首選。（自立電子報2026/5/25）

news.Title: The 3-Stock Custom Silicon Basket That Could Outperform Nvidia by 2030
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been a leading artificial intelligence (AI) stock for years now, with its share price surging 600% over the past three years. But a funny thing happened after the company reported its impressive October quarter results: Its share price fell. That's not Nvidia's fault, nor did investors have a good reason to punish the stock. But after its long and impressive run, it's becoming difficult for Nvidia to sustain its share price momentum. Will AI create the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA's share price has surged 600% over three years, but momentum is slowing, prompting investors to look at custom silicon processors.
• Custom silicon offers advantages over general-purpose GPUs by tuning processors for specific AI models, benefiting companies like Marvell (MRVL), Broadcom (AVGO), and Taiwan Semiconductor (TSMC).
• Broadcom's custom ASIC sales doubled to $8.4 billion in Q1, with AI revenue projected to reach $100 billion by next year.
• Marvell reported strong AI-led growth with total sales rising 42% to $8.2 billion in 2026 and is a key design partner for Amazon's AI chips.
• TSMC, the manufacturer for these chips, holds a 70% global market share in processor manufacturing and 90% in advanced AI processors, with sales up 41% in Q1.
news.Keywords: custom silicon, AI hardware, ASICs, GPUs, semiconductor manufacturing

news.Title: 凱基投信：台股基金團隊歷史實績可受檢驗
news.Content:
【記者柯安聰台北報導】市場上首檔不配息再投入的台股主動式ETF－凱基台灣主動式ETF基金（主動凱基台灣，00407A）預計於6月4日至6月10日間展開募集。檢視 凱基投信 過去台股基金累積報酬可發現，凱基台灣精五門基金多數期間績效表現皆為同類型前段班，短中長期表現皆具競爭力，這也印證了凱基台股基金團隊歷史實績可受檢驗。

儘管台股今年展現出強勁表現，但投資市場不可能永遠是多頭格局，能夠在經歷多空洗禮後仍繳出相對靠前的績效表現，代表研究團隊的能力經得起時間和市場環境的考驗。凱基台灣精五門基金無論是在今年以來，或是3個月、6個月、1年、2年、3年的累積報酬表現，多數都能位於同類型台股基金的平均之上，成立以來累積報酬更逾1674%，展現出能夠分辨價格波動與價值改變的選股與風險控管能力。市場呈現多空循環，若想追求相對穩定的報酬表現，需仰賴長期投資策略與紀律化執行，以降低基金在多頭時才進場追高、在市場恐慌時錯殺的機率。

凱基投信表示，在AI主權的軍備戰中，台灣掌握全球AI伺服器逾90%的產能，在AI創新發展中，台灣硬體供應鏈扮演重要角色，若沒有硬體生態系，AI根本沒有落地的算力，台廠供應鏈重要性可以想見。當台灣已經成為「世界的台灣」，要投資台股，必須先看懂全球供需變化。

凱基投信台股基金團隊在選股上的策略不只著重公司基本面，更運用台股企業獲利景氣循環圖與多因子模型，在不同的市場位階自動校準，一旦景氣出現變化時，風險控管系統即能發出預警，協助經理人預判前方路況。作為凱基投信推出的第一檔主動式ETF，主動凱基台灣將延續凱基投信台股團隊的投資策略，可望為投資人打造「抱得住、抱得久」的投資組合，追求超額報酬機會。

台灣今年第1季經濟成長率達13.69%，創下近39年來的新高紀錄，台股後市仍可期。布局台股、主動操作升維時間複利的主動凱基台灣成為投資人掌握台股成長紅利機會的新選項。

主動凱基台灣基金募集期間發行價10元，經理費每年0. 75%，保管費每年0.035%，凱基台股基金團隊首創主動台股ETF不配息機制，不只透過主動選股追求Alpha機會，更有望發揮時間複利的能力，是投資人得以相對較低門檻打包台股成長動能的優選之一。（自立電子報2026/5/25）

news.Title: 聯發科創歷史新高4245元　台股創新高收43645點　四大雲端服務供應商帶動AI狂潮能走多遠？
news.Content:
台股26日在台積電大漲55元、聯發科和台光電都創歷史新高的引領之下勁揚1376點，收在43644的歷史新高點。（圖片來源／ GOOGLE 街景）

在美股創新高之下，台股26日在台積電（2330）大漲55元、聯發科（2454）和台光電（2383）都創歷史新高的引領之下勁揚1376點，強漲3.26％收在43644點，再創歷史新高，成交量1.35兆元，而盤中大漲1377點是台股史上單日第五大收盤漲點。

聯發科和台光電漲停，台股登4萬3千點

台積電26日上漲55元收在2310元 ， 前7大權值股中就有4檔亮燈漲停，除了聯發科還有日月光（3711）、台光電、聯電（2303）。台光電還創歷史新高來到5505元，其他股價創歷史新高的還有頎邦（6147）已經連漲12周，股價再創歷史新高收在237元，日貿電（3065）也是漲停收在236.5元續創歷史新高，亞泰金屬（6727）漲停收在660元，富鼎（8261）漲停收在176元，泓格（3577）漲停收在160元。

三大法人合計買超 642.88 億元。其中外資買超 494.59 億；自營商賣買超 68.88 億元；投信買超 79.42 億元；三大法人合計買超 642.88 億元。外資買超前5大個股為華邦電（2344）、力積電（6770）、仁寶（2324）、鴻海（2317）、聯電。投信的最愛 淨買超第一名是台新新光金（2887）、廣達（2382）、華南金（2880）、長榮航（2618）、兆豐金（2886）。

銅箔基板、被動元件、石英元件、矽晶圓等遍地開花

凱基投顧分析師邱皓群指出AI族群從銅箔基板、被動元件、石英元件、矽晶圓等遍地開花，但他也引述美銀（BofA）5月統計顯示，全球基金經理人的平均現金水位已降至 3.9％（低於 4％ 代表經理人已大幅買進股票、持股比例高），顯示近期全球大盤是由經理人資金強力推升。他表示，根據歷史經驗（如2024、2025年數據），當經理人現金水位低於 4％ 時，後續買進力道通常會放緩，大盤可能轉為震盪或緩漲，此時操作應轉向尋找「相對低檔」的潛力族群。

邱皓群指出，美股四大雲端服務供應商（CSP）大舉砸錢建置 AI 基礎建設，今年資本支出預估從年初的 6500 億美元大幅上調至 7400 億美元（多出近 1000 億美元），直接惠及以硬體供應鏈為主的台廠。

浦惠投顧的資深分析師王倚隆在直播節目中指出，七巨頭（特別是超大型雲端服務商 CSP，如微軟、Google、Meta、亞馬遜）為了爭奪 AI 算力基礎設施與資料中心的主導權，進入了極具侵略性的重資本投入期。

雲端服務供應商資本支出帶動全球科技股大漲

他接著說，瘋狂砸錢大建 AI 基礎建設，導致 these 雲端服務商的資本支出佔營收比重一路飆升。到今年（2026年）之後，資本支出佔營收的比例已經逼近驚人的 38％。

由於資本支出上來的速度太快，導致原本現金滿滿的雲端大廠，其自由現金流佔營收比重在今年被壓縮到只剩下 2％ 左右，創下過去 20 年來的極低水準。</span

news.Title: 《美股》美國股市因適逢陣亡將士紀念日休市1天
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-26 06:15:44 郭妍希 發佈

美國股市週一(25日)因適逢陣亡將士紀念日(Memorial Day)休市一天。

結束中東衝突的談判似有進展、激勵道瓊工業平均指數在上週五躍上歷史收盤新高，高通(Qualcomm Inc.)等半導體類股跳漲，也讓費城半導體指數創下歷史收盤新高紀錄。

道瓊工業平均指數5月22日終場上漲0.58%(294.04點)、收50,579.70點，創歷史收盤新高；週K線上漲2.13%。那斯達克指數上漲0.19%(50.87點)、收26,343.97點；週K線上漲0.45%。標準普爾500指數上漲0.37%(27.75點)、收7,473.47點；週K線上漲0.88%。費城半導體指數上漲1.99%(238.46點)、收12,202.54點，創歷史收盤新高；週K線上漲5.3%。

標普500已連續第8週走揚，連漲週數創2023年12月以來新高。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.Title: Intel CEO Touts Balance Sheet Progress, Foundry Gains and AI CPU Demand
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Intel Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better. CEO Lip-Bu Tan said Intel has made early progress on strengthening its balance sheet, improving execution, and rebuilding customer trust, with help from government support and investments from NVIDIA and SoftBank. Tan said Intel’s foundry turnaround is still a long-term effort, but 18A is showing better yields and 14A is moving ahead with customer engagement, design kits, and a path toward risk production in 2028 and volume production in 2029. He also argued that agentic AI and other new workloads will boost CPU demand in data centers, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan reports progress in strengthening the balance sheet, improving execution, and rebuilding customer trust, aided by government support and investments from NVIDIA and SoftBank.
• Intel's foundry turnaround is a long-term effort; 18A yields are improving, and 14A is progressing towards risk production in 2028 and volume production in 2029.
• Agentic AI and new workloads are expected to boost CPU demand in data centers, while advanced packaging and new architectures may create opportunities in ASICs.
• Intel received support including CHIPS program funding converted to equity, a $5 billion investment from NVIDIA, and support from SoftBank.
• Intel 18A yield has improved by approximately 7% monthly, exceeding year-end targets, and 14A risk production is planned for 2028, aligning with TSMC's A14 timeline.

Someone has to collect it, label it, clean it, annotate it, and structure it into something a model can actually learn from. That unsexy, mission-critical process is exactly what Innodata (NASDAQ: INOD) does for seven of the ...

news.Title: Mark Zuckerberg sends another message to Meta employees
news.Content: Most executives announcing layoffs lean on a familiar script. They talk about efficiency, strategic alignment, and the need to position the company for long-term growth. The language is careful. The emotion is managed. What Mark Zuckerberg wrote to employees on May 20 was something different. In a memo to staff posted by Business Insider , Zuckerberg opened with a direct acknowledgment of the human cost behind the restructuring. "It's always sad to say goodbye to people who have contributed to our mission and to building this company," he wrote. "I feel the weight of that." That is not the language ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Mark Zuckerberg communicated a shift in strategy to Meta employees, acknowledging the human cost of recent layoffs.
• Meta is undergoing a significant restructuring, laying off approximately 8,000 employees (10% of its workforce).
• The company is redirecting capital aggressively towards AI infrastructure, foundational models, and AI-driven monetization, with a projected capex of $125-$145 billion for 2026.
• These layoffs are framed as a financing mechanism for this strategic redirection, not a sign of distress.
• Zuckerberg's message attempts to balance empathy with conviction about the company's ambitious AI goals, including 'personal superintelligence'.
news.Keywords: layoffs, restructuring, AI infrastructure, capital expenditure, strategic redirection

news.Title: Is Micron Technology Stock Destined to Join the Trillion-Dollar Club This Year?
news.Content: Shares of Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) have been surging in the past year, and the company, which sells memory and storage products, has a valuation that may still not look all that expensive given ongoing product shortages. Memory is in high demand, and that has enabled the business to generate robust results, with not ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology's stock has surged nearly 700% in the past 12 months, with its market cap approaching $850 billion.
• The company benefits from high demand for memory and storage products, leading to significant sales volume increases and price hikes.
• Despite its run-up, Micron trades at a modest P/E of 35 and a forward P/E of less than 8, with a PEG ratio under 0.30.

news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft is cancelling most internal Claude Code licenses for its Experiences and Devices division engineers, directing them to use GitHub Copilot CLI instead.
• Engineers had reportedly favored Anthropic's Claude Code over Microsoft's own product, leading to its cancellation.
• The move, effective June 30, 2026, is attributed to 'toolchain unification' and potential cost reduction, aligning with the end of Microsoft's fiscal year.
• High usage of token-based AI tools like Claude Code can lead to significant, unpredictable costs at enterprise scale, as seen with Uber's experience.
• This reflects a broader pricing reckoning in enterprise AI, with platforms like GitHub shifting to usage-based billing models.
news.Keywords: internal tool policy, AI cost management, usage-based billing, toolchain unification, enterprise AI economics
