news.Title: Short Sellers Aren’t Relenting Against Qualcomm. The Chipmaker Needs to Quickly Deliver on Its AI Pivot for Bulls to Win.
news.Content: For years now, short sellers on Wall Street have treated semiconductor stocks like a dangerous game of timing. These investors bet against companies by borrowing shares and selling them, hoping prices fall so they can buy them back cheaper later. When chip stocks stumble, short sellers see opportunity. When AI excitement takes over, they often get burned. Right now, semiconductor stocks, like Qualcomm (QCOM) are right at the center of it again. QCOM stock was pressured in 2026 amid weak smartphone demand, a global memory glut, and a cautious near-term outlook. But it recently swung from as low as $122 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Short interest in Qualcomm (QCOM) has reached nearly $11.8 billion, its highest in a decade, indicating significant bearish sentiment.
• Despite recent price volatility and pressure from weak smartphone demand and a memory glut, QCOM stock has gained over 100% from its recent lows.
• Concerns persist regarding slowing smartphone demand, stretched semiconductor valuations, and doubts about the company's AI diversification.
• Qualcomm's Q2 results provided some confidence, and new data center processors are expected to ship, but bulls need tangible execution to overcome skepticism.
• The stock has shown strong recent performance (up 40.22% YTD), but faces pressure to prove its AI pivot is more than just a narrative.
news.Keywords: short interest, AI pivot, semiconductor, smartphone demand, valuation concerns

news.Title: Why Tesla Robotaxi Dreams Can't Rescue Today's Weak Fundamentals
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) is ceasing to be a high-growth story and an enterprise that is experiencing a challenging reset. The vehicle deliveries have stagnated, margins are squeezing, and profitability has plummeted drastically with price reductions, increased costs and the loss of fading regulatory credits taking its toll on the outcomes. Healthy automotive margins have gone down to about 1718% range, and operating margins have dropped to around 45%, leaving them a small cushion in the event that demand drops further. Warning! GuruFocus has detected 8 Warning Signs with TSLA. Is TSLA fairly ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's (TSLA) fundamentals are weakening, with stagnating vehicle deliveries, shrinking margins (automotive margins around 17-18%, operating margins around 4-5%), and plummeting profitability.
• The company is making significant investments in autonomy, robotics, and capacity, straining earnings without immediate returns.
• Loss of high-margin carbon credit revenue has removed a significant earnings cushion.
• International EV competition is increasing, and an aging product portfolio limits pricing power.
• The market is valuing Tesla heavily on future AI and robotaxi potential, with an estimated $1.25 trillion of its value attributed to unproven future businesses.
news.Keywords: fundamental weakness, margin compression, valuation, AI narrative, capital expenditure

news.Title: Apple: Strong Execution, But Valuation Leaves Me Cautious
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Apple just reported another strong quarter, and there is no point pretending otherwise. Revenue reached $111.2 billion, up 17% year over year, and earnings per share came in at $2.01, ahead of the consensus estimate. iPhone revenue grew 22%, Services added 16%, and every geographic region posted double-digit growth. This is one of the best-operated companies in the world, and the quarter did nothing to undermine that reputation. Is AAPL fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator. And yet I find myself more reserved than the headline numbers suggest, and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple (AAPL) reported a strong quarter with revenue of $111.2 billion (+17% YoY) and EPS of $2.01, beating consensus estimates.
• iPhone revenue grew 22% to nearly $57 billion, and Services revenue increased 16% to $31 billion, with Greater China showing a significant 28% revenue jump.
• Gross margin improved to 49.3%, driven by the higher-margin Services segment (76.7% gross margin).
• However, the stock's valuation at approximately 36 times earnings is considered high, with the market pricing in significant future AI-driven growth not yet demonstrated.
• A potential headwind from rising memory chip costs is flagged, which could pressure product gross margins.
news.Keywords: valuation, revenue growth, services, gross margin, AI growth expectations

• New offerings include Universal Cart, an agentic AI shopping tool, and Gemini Spark, a 24/7 personal assistant.

• Alphabet's strategy leverages its distribution advantage and custom chips to integrate AI deeply into its ecosystem, aiming for strong future monetization.

Google parent Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: ...

news.Title: 3 Reasons Nvidia Still Has Plenty of Room to Run
news.Content: Although Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) may be the world's most valuable company, I think the stock still has a lot of room to rise. news.AI_Summary:

• The data-center build-out trend is projected to continue for many years, with hyperscaler capital expenditures potentially reaching $3 trillion to $4 trillion by 2030, benefiting Nvidia's primary revenue driver.
• Nvidia's Q1 revenue reached $81.6 billion, with the data-center division contributing $75.2 billion, representing 85% year-over-year growth.

news.Title: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Huawei Technologies Co. said it has come up with a new pathway to shorten its gap with industry leader Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., potentially achieving a breakthrough in making advanced semiconductors without cutting-edge equipment. Most Read from Bloomberg Nvidia CEO Urges Super Micro to Tighten Up on Compliance Trump Doctor Visit Renews Health Scrutiny as 80th Birthday Nears Trump Says He’ll Announce Negotiated Deal With Iran Shortly Rubio Sees Good News Coming on Hormuz as Iran Talks Continue US, Iran Inch Toward Deal as Gaps Remain on Uranium, Sanctions ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Huawei claims a breakthrough in chip manufacturing with its 'LogicFolding' technology, aiming to reduce the five-year gap with TSMC.
• Huawei plans to produce 1.4nm chips by 2031, while TSMC targets the same for 2028, potentially bypassing the need for ASML's EUV machines.
• The new 'Her's Law' (formerly Tau Scaling Law) focuses on boosting data transmission speed to compensate for limitations in shrinking transistor size without advanced lithography.
• The announcement led to a surge in Chinese chip stocks, with SMIC rising over 18% and Hua Hong Semiconductor hitting its daily limit.

news.Content: SpaceX is gearing up for what could be the largest initial public offering (IPO) in history, targeting a capital raise of around $75 billion and a valuation between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion . While Wall Street fixates on SpaceX's debut, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's potential $75 billion IPO could be the largest in history, with a valuation between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion.

news.Title: Walmart vs. Costco: Which Is the Better "Recession-Proof" Stock to Buy Now?
news.Content: The major stock market indexes are hovering around all-time highs, but the economy is chock-full of cracks beneath the surface. Higher gas prices are adding even more pressure on already strained consumers. The housing market is in a prolonged, multi-year slowdown. Wage growth isn't keeping up with the cost of living, and the labor market faces profound paradigm shifts driven by artificial intelligence (AI). Will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Walmart and Costco are considered 'recession-proof' stocks due to their focus on value, private labels, and efficient operations, despite low operating margins.
• Both retailers have expanded beyond in-store experiences with services like e-commerce delivery and pharmacy offerings.
• Despite steady growth, both stocks trade at high valuations (Walmart P/E ~41.5x forward, Costco P/E ~51.1x forward), making them potentially overvalued.
• Walmart is highlighted as a slightly better buy due to its AI integration, longer dividend growth streak (53 years), and more predictable dividend payout compared to Costco's special dividends.
news.Keywords: consumer staples, recession resilience, valuation, retail operations, dividend growth

news.Title: 韓媒：美光科技HBM4產能倍增 2027年量產轉由台積電代工的HBM4E
news.Content: 韓媒《THE ELEC》周一 (25 日) 報導，美光科技( MU-US )第六代高頻寬記憶體 (HBM4) 產能爬坡進展順利，速度較去年 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美光科技（MU）第六代高頻寬記憶體（HBM4）產能爬坡順利，速度較HBM3提升兩倍，良率同步改善。
• HBM4將用於輝達下一代Rubin AI運算平台，美光核心DRAM採用1β製程，搭配自研基底晶片。
• 在更先進的HBM4E世代，美光將採用首次導入EUV的1γ製程，基底晶片將轉由台積電（2330）代工，預計2027年量產。
• 三星電子預計今年第二季送出HBM4E樣品，SK海力士則打算2027年量產，基底採用台積電3奈米製程。
• 業界分析，美光與台積電合作，有望縮小與韓系大廠差距，爭奪AI伺服器記憶體市場主導權。
news.Keywords: HBM, AI伺服器, 美光, 台積電, 記憶體

news.Title: 追擊台積電、不靠ASML？華為喊技術突破 2031年量產1.4奈米
news.Content: 華為技術（Huawei Technologies）表示，已提出一條新的技術路徑，有望縮小與產業龍頭台積電 ( 2330-TW ) ( TSM-US ) 之間的差距，甚至在缺乏最先進設備的情況下，實現 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 華為宣稱已開發出「邏輯折疊」技術，目標在2031年生產1.4奈米晶片，試圖縮小與台積電的差距。
• 此技術若成功，可能打破必須依賴ASML的EUV設備才能生產先進製程晶片的業界認知。
• 華為預計在2025年推出麒麟9030Pro，並將「麒麟2026」作為邏輯折疊技術的首次應用。
• 此舉旨在應對摩爾定律面臨的物理極限和成本挑戰，並在美國出口限制下推動半導體自主化。

news.Title: 賺完高息換賺超額報酬！台股主動式 ETF 爆紅 你跟上了嗎？
news.Content:
財經中心／王駿凱報導

過去幾年，台灣投資人對 ETF 的熱愛，幾乎全被高股息與市值型給包辦了。但在台股衝上高點、AI 與半導體供應鏈進入超級週期的推動下，產業輪動速度快到讓人目不暇給。傳統被動追蹤指數的 ETF，因為具有調整落 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 在AI浪潮及產業輪動加速下，台股主動式ETF爆紅，吸引千億資金進駐。
• 主動式ETF由專業經理人操盤，可隨市場風向即時調整策略，追求超額報酬。
• 金管會放寬法規（台積電條款），主動式ETF對單一個股投資上限提高至25%，有利重倉龍頭股。
• 主動式ETF適合追求超額報酬且風險承受度較高的投資人，但需注意經理人判斷失誤、內扣費用及折溢價風險。

news.Title: IAC Conference Highlights People Inc. Pivot, AI Licensing Upside and MGM Bet
news.Content: Key Points Interested in IAC Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. IAC is simplifying into People Inc. Executives said the company has narrowed its structure after spinning off Angi, selling Care and winding down search, leaving People Inc. as the core operating business alongside the MGM stake and a few smaller investments. People Inc. is leaning into digital and off-platform revenue. Management said 70% of revenue now comes from digital media and 41% is non-session-based revenue, with growth coming from syndication, social, ad tech, events and AI licensing rather than only website traffic. AI licensing and MGM remain ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IAC is transforming into People Inc., simplifying its structure by spinning off Angi, selling Care, and winding down search.
• People Inc. is focusing on digital media and off-platform revenue, with 70% of revenue from digital and 41% from non-session-based sources.
• Key growth drivers include syndication, social media, ad tech, events, and AI licensing, with licensing deals signed with OpenAI and Microsoft.
• The company reported 8% overall revenue growth in the quarter, driven by a 24% increase in non-session-based revenue.
• MGM Resorts International remains a significant investment, and capital allocation priorities include buybacks, MGM ownership, and People Inc. acquisitions.

news.Title: Billionaire Bill Gates' Foundation Sold Its Microsoft Stake and Has 43% of Its $33 Billion Portfolio Invested in 2 Other Stocks
news.Content: Bill Gates is best known as the co-founder of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) , which has been one of the most valuable companies in the world for the past 30 years. After his wealth soared to more than $100 billion in the 1990s amid the run-up in tech stocks , Gates started to step back from his business to focus on his philanthropic endeavors. He founded the Gates Foundation to combat poverty, disease, and inequity worldwide. Today, Gates is still worth over $100 billion, despite donating huge sums to the foundation, including a considerable number of Microsoft shares. He ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Bill Gates Foundation has sold its remaining Microsoft stake, reducing its direct exposure.
• The Foundation's $33 billion portfolio is now heavily invested in value stocks, with Berkshire Hathaway being the top holding (approx. 25%).
• Despite the sale from the trust, Bill Gates personally owns 103 million shares of Microsoft, valued at approximately $43 billion.
• Microsoft's cloud computing and software businesses are experiencing rapid growth, driven by AI demand, and trade at an attractive forward P/E of 25x.
• The article highlights Berkshire Hathaway's solid Q1 results under new CEO Greg Abel, with improvements in insurance underwriting and railroad operations.
news.Keywords: philanthropy, portfolio allocation, value investing, cloud growth, forward P/E

news.Content: SoundHound AI (NASDAQ: SOUN) has fallen out of favor once again, but don't assume this means Wall Street has finally had it with this early-stage artificial intelligence (AI) play. The company, which focuses on developing AI-based ...

news.Title: 台積電驚爆「砍15%分紅」！ 工程師怒了：不排除效法三星大罷工
news.Content: 有「護國神山」之稱的台灣積體電路製造公司近期驚傳擬削減員工分紅高達15%，消息一出立即在科技圈掀起震撼。由於台積電近年受惠A ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台灣積體電路製造公司（台積電）近期傳出擬削減員工分紅高達15%，引發科技圈震撼與員工不滿。
• 員工抱怨公司高層「想改就改、毫無誠信」，並揚言效法三星發動罷工，爭取權益。
• 員工不滿在高壓工作環境下犧牲生活健康，卻面臨獎金縮減，認為無法接受。
• 外媒分析指出，台積電龐大的資本支出計畫可能影響成本控制，但若爆發大規模罷工，恐衝擊全球AI供應鏈。
• 目前分紅消息仍屬員工間流傳，台積電尚未正式證實，但員工不滿情緒持續升溫。
news.Keywords: 員工分紅, 罷工風險, 勞資爭議, AI供應鏈, 資本支出

news.Title: 台股最大半導體ETF強勢填息 成分股近九成是「積友友」

• 法人預期，在AI算力需求與台積電技術領先雙重支撐下，半導體族群仍是台股中長線主流。
news.Keywords: AI供應鏈,半導體ETF,台積電,先進製程,系統級整合

news.Title: Apple vs. Microsoft: What Their Revenue Trends Reveal for Investors
news.Content: Apple: Massive Scale With Seasonal Spikes Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) designs and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, and wearables worldwide, and it operates various platforms like the App Store alongside subscription-based services such as Apple TV+ and Apple Music. It recently announced an expansion of its specialized data centers and introduced lower-priced smartphone models. The company ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple reported $111.2 billion in sales for fiscal Q2 2026 (ended March 2026), a 17% year-over-year increase, with its services segment reaching an all-time high of $31 billion.
• Microsoft reported $82.9 billion in sales for fiscal Q3 2026 (ended March 2026), an 18% year-over-year increase, with its AI business exceeding an annual revenue run rate of $37 billion (up 123% YoY).
• Microsoft's capital expenditures increased by 49% YoY to $31.9 billion, supporting its AI expansion.
• Apple's revenue trends show significant seasonal swings, with Q4 being its largest sales period.
• Microsoft demonstrates steady quarter-over-quarter revenue growth, driven by AI tailwinds, while Apple capitalizes on product and service appeal.
news.Keywords: revenue trends, seasonal swings, AI tailwind, capital expenditures, services segment

news.Title: 看準台積熊本科技紅利，日本三井不動產熊本科學園區開發案大舉來台招商
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者張家瑋報導】台積電(2330)全球版圖擴張，日本熊本廠已成為帶動半導體聚落成型的關鍵引擎，隨著供應鏈廠商加速進駐，不僅推升了當地工業基礎建設需求，更進一步點燃了周邊房地產與商用設施的開發商機。看準此波半導 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 日本三井不動產啟動熊本科學園區開發案，來台招商，鎖定台積電熊本廠周邊供應鏈。
• 該科學園區緊鄰台積電、索尼及東京威力科創等半導體廠，形成強大產業鏈磁吸效應。
• 開發案定位為熊本縣「分散型科學園區」核心據點，將引進半導體企業與學術機構，建構產官學合作平台。
• 崇越科技已在熊本設立營業所，提供材料、物流及技術服務，營收呈現爆發性成長。

news.Title: 3 AI Stocks I Wouldn't Hesitate to Buy Now
news.Content: The market may have had a strong run over the past two months, but there are still plenty of stocks that look like great buys right now. Three AI stocks ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) is highlighted for its strong AI leadership, posting 85% YoY revenue growth to $81.6 billion and expecting $91 billion for Q2.
• Meta Platforms (META) shows Q1 revenue growth of 33% YoY, driven by AI improvements in its advertising business, and is considered a value play at less than 19x forward earnings.
• Amazon (AMZN) is positioned as an AI play through its cloud computing business, AWS, which saw revenue accelerate to 28% YoY, its best growth in nearly four years.

• Amazon is investing $200 billion in data center capital expenditures this year, expecting major growth acceleration as this capacity comes online.

news.Title: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock That Doesn't Need a Bull Market to Make You Money
news.Content: Not every artificial intelligence (AI) stock needs a bull market to outpace the S&P 500 . Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) is in the middle of a generational run as its NAND flash memory chips gain momentum amid the AI build-out. The stock has had close to 4,000% in gains over the past ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk (SNDK) is experiencing significant growth in NAND flash memory chips driven by AI demand, with stock gains near 4,000% over the past year.
• Revenue surged 251% year-over-year to $5.95 billion in fiscal 2026 Q3, with guidance implying 34.5% sequential growth for Q4.
• The NAND flash memory market is projected to remain undersupplied through at least 2027, with a projected 30.6% CAGR for the AI industry through 2033.
• Unlike the crypto mining boom, current demand is driven by hyperscalers like Amazon and Meta Platforms, which have strong balance sheets and consistent spending.
• Sandisk's strong customer base and sustained demand from major tech players suggest continued growth potential even during market downturns.
news.Keywords: NAND flash memory, AI demand, revenue surge, supply shortage, hyperscaler demand

news.Title: 黃仁勳每月飛台求產能 專家：台積是全球科技Fed
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-25 08:43:52 郭妍希 發佈

前高盛(Goldman Sachs)高階主管Michael Parekh形容台積電(2330)是「全球科技市場的聯準會(Fed)」，因為該公司對全球先進晶片產能握有絕 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 前高盛高階主管Michael Parekh將台積電比喻為「全球科技市場的聯準會」，因其掌握全球先進晶片產能的關鍵控制權。
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳為爭取更多產能，幾乎每月親自飛往台灣向台積電請求，顯示AI需求對台積電產能的龐大壓力。
• Parekh指出，台積電正謹慎評估眼前龐大的AI需求與自身產能建置能力，其審慎的擴產節奏（需時三至五年、耗資數百億美元）並非固執，而是極度理性的表現。
• AI革命的規模比過去網際網路、行動通訊、雲端運算等浪潮更為龐大，預計未來六年市場規模可達4至5兆美元，但前提是台積電能擴大產能。
• 硬體產能擴張已跟不上AI發展速度，希捷等廠商也面臨滿足AI激增需求的困境，寧可選擇技術轉型也不盲目擴產。
news.Keywords: 產能瓶頸,AI革命,先進製程,擴產策略,供需平衡

news.Title: 黃仁勳蘇姿丰陳立武都來了！三大AI巨頭合體引爆台股
news.Content: 台北國際電腦展（COMPUTEX 2026）將於6月2日登場，輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳（Jensen Huang）、超微（AMD）董事長暨執行長蘇姿丰（Lisa Su）及英特爾（Intel）執行長陳立武（Lip-Bu Tan），三位華人 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三大AI巨頭輝達、超微、英特爾的執行長齊聚台北，為即將登場的Computex展造勢，預計將引爆台股AI話題，並有望挑戰新高。
• AI巨頭們的台灣之行，旨在確保台積電的先進製程與高階先進封裝產能，以及鴻海、廣達等台廠在伺服器零組件上的支持。
• 超微執行長蘇姿丰看好自家處理器市場年成長率達35%，並承諾對台灣產業生態系投資逾百億美元，深化合作關係。

news.Title: The Best Stocks to Buy Right Now: Nvidia vs. AMD vs. Broadcom
news.Content: Since the start of the artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure boom, the market has been dominated by Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) . However, as the landscape shifts from training foundational large language models (LLMs) to inference and agentic AI , Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) and Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) are emerging as strong players. Let's look at what each brings to the table and which is the best stock to buy right now. Will AI create the world's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia maintains its leadership in AI training due to its CUDA software platform and GPUs, and is expanding into inference and agentic AI with LPUs and Vera Rubin CPUs.
• AMD is emerging as a strong competitor in the AI inference market, leveraging its chiplet design for increased memory capacity and improvements in its ROCm software.
• Broadcom is a key player in custom AI chip development (ASICs) for hyperscalers seeking cost savings, and also benefits from its leadership in data center networking.
• Broadcom anticipates significant growth, with a clear line of sight to over $100 billion in ASIC revenue by fiscal 2027.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, LLM training, inference, agentic AI, ASIC, GPUs, CPUs

news.Keywords: semiconductor equipment, AI demand, onshoring, market share, long-term growth

news.Title: Qualcomm Stock Is the Sleeping Giant of the AI Revolution. It’s Starting to Wake Up.
news.Content: When it comes to artificial intelligence (AI) chip space, Wall Street tends to list the exact same big names: Nvidia (NVDA), Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), and Intel (INTC). Amid the AI-driven market cap race, Qualcomm (QCOM) has remained in the shadows for some time; as the tech sector bloated with price-to-earnings (P/E) multiples of 50 times or more, QCOM stock traded at a modest discount. The reason for this calm has been understandable. The market has only perceived Qualcomm as a beneficiary of the stagnating mobile sector. More than that, the company has carried a heavy overhang of risks, from ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Qualcomm (QCOM) is emerging as a significant player in the AI chip space, moving beyond its traditional mobile sector focus.
• The company is targeting the server market with a three-pronged strategy: custom Oryon core processors, AI inference accelerators, and custom cloud provider chips.
• Qualcomm's 'cold chip' engineering, focused on power efficiency, is becoming crucial for AI inference tasks, addressing energy consumption and TCO concerns.
• The company has secured a deal with an unnamed large client for AI chip delivery by the end of 2026, indicating cloud giants are seeking alternatives to current infrastructure.
• Long-term potential lies in physical AI and robotics, where Qualcomm's technological expertise could provide a decisive advantage.
news.Keywords: AI inference, server market, power efficiency, custom silicon, physical AI

news.Title: This Billionaire Dumped Cloud Stocks for These New AI Stocks. Should Investors Follow Suit?
news.Content: Billionaire portfolio manager Philippe Laffont of Coatue Management had a busy first quarter. The technology-focused investor significantly cut back his fund's stakes in the big three cloud providers Amazon , Alphabet , and Microsoft , while completely exiting his position in Oracle . Meanwhile, he was buying a pair of semiconductor infrastructure enablers. He boosted his stake in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (NYSE: TSM) , which is his top holding, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Billionaire Philippe Laffont of Coatue Management reduced stakes in cloud providers (Amazon, Alphabet, Microsoft) and exited Oracle, shifting focus to semiconductor infrastructure enablers.
• Laffont increased his stake in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC), his top holding, and initiated a position in ASML Holding.
• TSMC, the world's largest foundry, holds a near-monopoly in manufacturing advanced logic chips like GPUs and benefits from its scale, high yields, and advanced packaging technology (CoWos).
• ASML holds a monopoly on extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography, essential for advanced chipmaking, and is poised to benefit from increased demand for its machines from foundries and memory makers.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, foundry, lithography, AI infrastructure, cloud providers

news.Title: Google Just Shared Bad News for Nvidia, and Even Worse News For CoreWeave and Nebius
news.Content: Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) CEO Sundar Pichai shared some interesting news during the company's first-quarter earnings call. Google will start to deliver its custom AI accelerator chips, Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), to a select group of customers for their own data centers. The company has already signed a deal to sell chips to Anthropic and has a tentative agreement to sell directly to Meta Platforms . Now it has a third customer. Google is partnering ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (Google) will offer its custom AI accelerator chips (TPUs) to select customers, including a joint venture with Blackstone to build a new cloud compute-as-a-service company.
• This move aims to increase adoption of Google's TPUs, gain economies of scale, and potentially erode Nvidia's dominant market share in AI accelerators, particularly in the neocloud segment.
• The new Google-Blackstone venture plans to deploy 500 MW of TPU capacity by next year, posing a competitive threat to existing neocloud leaders like CoreWeave and Nebius.
• While the immediate threat to Nvidia is low, Google's ambitions signal a significant shift in the AI compute landscape, potentially impacting competitors' market share and access to manufacturing capacity at TSMC.
news.Keywords: AI accelerators, TPUs, cloud computing, market share, competition, neocloud

news.Title: The Broadcom Stock Paradox: Why a $2 Trillion Valuation Ignores the Base Economics of Custom Chips
news.Content: The market capitalization of Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) is rapidly approaching the $2 trillion mark. This fact alone places the company in the club of the largest technological giants of the planet. But in my view, the current market valuation appears overheated, and investors, pricing in perpetual growth while assuming margins remain intact, are making a mistake. The current optimism is understandable. Broadcom positions itself in the market as the main beneficiary and leader in the segment of custom AI-chips (ASIC), forming long-term alliances with key consumers of computing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom (AVGO) is approaching a $2 trillion valuation, but the market may be overestimating future growth and margin sustainability in its custom AI-chip segment.
• Unlike Nvidia's general-purpose GPUs, Broadcom's custom ASIC model involves co-development with clients like Alphabet and Meta, aiming to reduce client costs, which implies a margin ceiling.
• While Broadcom shows revenue growth ($19.3 billion last quarter), its high gross margins (75.6%) are primarily driven by its mature software business (VMware) and networking, not custom silicon.
• The market's extrapolation of high margins onto the custom chip segment, which is focused on client cost savings, is seen as a potential flaw in valuation models.
news.Keywords: valuation, custom silicon, AI chips, gross margin, business model

news.Title: Nvidia's Board Just Authorized an Additional $80 Billion Buyback. Here's What That Really Signals to Investors.
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) rarely has to remind anyone how fast it's growing. So it was a little surprising when, earlier this week, the chipmaker paired its latest quarterly report with a move that looked borrowed from a mature blue chip: its board approved an additional $80 billion for share repurchases and lifted the quarterly dividend from $0.01 to $0.25 a share -- a 25-fold increase. The backdrop is what makes it notable. This is a business that just grew revenue 85% ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia announced an additional $80 billion share buyback authorization and a 25-fold increase in its quarterly dividend.
• The company reported Q1 FY2027 revenue of $81.6 billion, an 85% year-over-year increase, with data center revenue up 92% to $75.2 billion.
• Free cash flow reached $48.6 billion in Q1 FY2027, nearly double the previous year, supporting shareholder returns.
• Nvidia's guidance projects Q2 revenue of approximately $91 billion, indicating further acceleration.
• Risks include the loss of the Chinese market (no data center chips shipped in Q1) and increasing competition from customers designing their own AI chips.

news.Title: Wall Street Was Sleeping on the "Bits-to-Atoms" Trade. This Growth Stock Could Profit.

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Intel CEO reveals rare ‘speed-of-light’ turnaround plan
news.Content: "Speed of light." That's a phrase that gets thrown around in corporate turnaround stories so often that it has almost lost meaning: "We're moving faster." When Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan says it, he is referring to cutting the management hierarchy from 12 layers to 5. Speaking at the J.P. news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: We’re Not in a Bubble. Wall Street Just Hasn’t Caught Up With the New ‘Physics’ of the Stock Market.

news.Title: Billionaire Bill Ackman Just Dumped Alphabet Stock to Buy These Two AI Stocks. Should Investors Follow Suit?
news.Content: Bill Ackman is one of the world's preeminent investors. He runs a very concentrated portfolio of just a handful of stocks, so when he makes moves, investors tend to pay attention. In Q1, Ackman's Pershing Square Management (NYSE: PS) fund took a huge new stake in Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) while increasing its position in Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) by 19%. To help fund these new purchases, Ackman sold 95% of his stake in fellow ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Billionaire Bill Ackman's Pershing Square fund significantly increased its stake in Microsoft (MSFT) and Amazon (AMZN) in Q1.
• Ackman sold 95% of his Alphabet (GOOGL) holdings to fund these new investments, though he remains long-term bullish on Alphabet.
• He favors Microsoft due to its strong cloud (Azure) and software (Microsoft 365) businesses, and its OpenAI stake.
• Amazon's e-commerce and AWS cloud segments are seen as dominant franchises with long-term growth potential.
• The fund manager believes software companies tied to customer workflows are AI beneficiaries, not losers.
news.Keywords: Portfolio reallocation, hedge fund activity, AI beneficiaries, cloud computing, enterprise software

news.Title: Boom or Bubble? This Is Where Micron Technology Stock Could Be in 5 Years
news.Content: The memory industry has been booming for the past three years, propelled by the proliferation of artificial intelligence (AI), which has created demand for larger, faster memory across multiple applications. Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) has been a major beneficiary of the memory boom. Micron stock has shot up by 935% over the past three years, driven by a big jump in its revenue and earnings. Investors, however, may now be wondering if the memory specialist has now entered bubble territory, especially considering that it has been historically susceptible ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) has benefited significantly from the AI-driven memory boom, with its stock up 935% over three years.
• The demand for larger, faster memory for AI workloads in data centers, particularly High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM), is driving the current cycle.
• HBM revenue is projected to reach $55 billion in 2026 and $130 billion by 2030, with data centers consuming 70% of memory supply.
• Memory manufacturers are prioritizing HBM over DRAM, leading to potential shortages until 2030 due to long fabrication plant lead times.
• Micron returned to revenue growth and profitability in 2024, with a favorable pricing environment expected to sustain its growth.
news.Keywords: Memory market, AI demand, HBM, supply constraints, semiconductor cycle

news.Title: 台積電獲保育共生地認證　台灣半導體企業首例
news.Content: （中央社記者張建中新竹2026年5月22日電）台積電 (2330) 今天舉辦「生態解碼生物多樣性Power Up!」活動，號召員工從北中南加入生態志工行列，並見證台積電成為全台第一家 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台積電成為台灣首家獲得保育共生地認證（OECM）的半導體企業，展現科技與棲地生態共榮的精神。
• 台積電的晶圓15A廠保留綠地並進行生態物種調查，營造成富生物多樣性的綠帶環境，並成功復育瀕危物種巴氏銀鮈。
• 晶圓15A廠也是全國首座通過「環境教育設施場所」認證的半導體企業，推廣永續理念。

news.Title: AMD Expands Taiwan Capacity as AI Tightens CPU Supply
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD , Financials ) is moving to expand production capacity in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is expanding its production capacity in Taiwan to meet higher-than-expected CPU demand, indicating AI growth beyond GPUs.
• CEO Lisa Su stated that the global CPU market is tight, with AMD working with partners to increase supply throughout 2024 and significantly more capacity planned for 2027.
• Demand is driven by AI inferencing and agentic AI, increasing the need for CPUs in data centers and enterprise systems.
• AMD plans to invest over $10 billion in Taiwan's AI sector, focusing on advanced packaging, substrates, and rack-scale AI systems.
• The company is also ramping up production of its Venice CPUs using TSMC's 2-nanometer process technology.
news.Keywords: CPU supply, AI inferencing, data center demand, Taiwan manufacturing, advanced packaging

news.Title: 搶台積電大客戶？三星李在鎔訪台密會聯發科 出狠招拉攏
news.Content: 三星靠著記憶體狂潮扭轉半導體部門的營運困境，如今又想藉此拉抬連年虧損的晶圓代工業務，傳出三星會長李在鎔與多位高層低調訪台，行程 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星會長李在鎔低調訪台，傳聞將拜訪聯發科執行長蔡力行，試圖藉由記憶體產能優勢，拉攏聯發科支持其晶圓代工業務，作為第二供應來源。
• 業界認為，超微與特斯拉願意下單三星，是考量其記憶體產能，能確保HBM與DRAM的供應；聯發科取得Google TPU訂單後，也配合Google策略下單英特爾先進封裝，讓三星感到有機可趁。
• 三星欲藉此推進晶圓代工業務，但關鍵仍在於良率與規模能否符合客戶期待，目前台積電在此方面仍具顯著優勢。
• 英特爾積極推銷先進製程與封裝技術，可能爭取到輝達等重要客戶，與台積電形成競爭；三星則利用記憶體優勢打包晶圓代工，市場競爭激烈。
news.Keywords: 晶圓代工,記憶體,先進製程,市場競爭,供應鏈策略

news.Title: TSMC Trails 140% AI Rallies As Investors Broaden Chip Bets
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. ( NYSE:TSM ) is still one of Asia's most important AI beneficiaries , but investors are no longer treating it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Investors are broadening their chip investments beyond TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.) as AI demand spreads across various hardware segments.
• TSMC shares are up 46% year-to-date, but MediaTek and Samsung Electronics have seen rallies exceeding 140%.
• MediaTek is gaining traction for its work on application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) with Alphabet.
• Samsung is benefiting from its position as the world's largest memory maker and has joined the $1 trillion market cap club.
• Fund managers are diversifying due to single-stock limits and TSMC's significant weighting in the Taiwan index, looking at other Asian tech names.
news.Keywords: Chip sector diversification, AI hardware, ASIC development, memory market, investment strategy

news.Title: SpaceX IPO: Why It Could Burst the AI Bubble
news.Content: Talk of an AI bubble has faded since late last year, when signs of weakness in some AI stocks and fears around circular deals triggered a sell-off in names like Nvidia . Since then, a shortage in memory chips and strong demand growth have sent AI stocks surging again, with major indexes hitting all-time highs following the dip over the Iran war. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's IPO filing reveals a potential AI bubble test, with a $2 trillion valuation target.
• SpaceX reported Q1 revenue growth of 15.4% to $4.7 billion and a GAAP operating loss of $1.9 billion.
• The company's 2025 revenue was $18.7 billion, with an operating loss of $2.6 billion.
• A $2 trillion valuation for SpaceX implies a price-to-sales ratio over 100, significantly higher than most S&P 500 stocks.
• The IPO could either fuel an AI stock frenzy or trigger a sell-off if the valuation proves unsustainable.
news.Keywords: AI bubble, IPO valuation, SpaceX financials, semiconductor cycle, market sentiment

news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( TSLA , Financials ) is facing fresh speculation that it could eventually combine ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla faces renewed speculation of a potential merger with SpaceX following SpaceX's IPO filing.
• Wedbush analyst Dan Ives suggests a merger could occur by next year, consolidating Elon Musk's ventures.
• Traders show reduced confidence in a Tesla-SpaceX merger, with odds for a deal before May 2027 dropping significantly.
• A merger could offer Tesla a broader technology narrative amidst increasing competition in China.
• Complex governance issues and the need for board approvals from both companies would need to be addressed for any combination.
news.Keywords: merger speculation, corporate structure, AI infrastructure, competitive landscape, governance

news.Title: AI導入半導體設備！科林研發強化感測功能 助台積等客戶提升晶圓良率
news.Content: 半導體設備大廠科林研發 (Lam Research)(LRCX-US) 執行長 Tim Archer，公司計劃為半導體製造設備導入更多感測器與人 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 半導體設備大廠科林研發（Lam Research）計劃在未來兩年內，為其設備導入更多感測器與人工智慧（AI）功能，以提升生產效率。
• AI分析設備數據有助於客戶發現問題與製程瓶頸，進而提升每片晶圓的產出量並降低瑕疵率。
• 公司宣布投資新創公司Lightfinder，以將晶片量測設備小型化並整合至現有設備中。
• 科林研發將在亞利桑那州鳳凰城地區增設新據點，以支援台積電等客戶需求。
• 公司持續擴大加州總部投資，並已在台積電亞利桑那州廠區附近購置建築，預計將用於支援客戶需求。

news.Title: Wall Street's Favorite New AI Stock vs. the One They're Ignoring: The Numbers Aren't Even Close
news.Content: One of Wall Street's favorite artificial intelligence (AI) stocks right now is, no surprise, the semiconductor company Cerebras (NASDAQ: CBRS) . It's been a publicly traded company for only about a week, but enthusiasm is high. Investors rushing in to buy the stock have pushed it up by about 60% from its $185 IPO price as of this writing. But not all AI stocks are feeling the love right now, especially not Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) . Despite solid growth in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft reported fiscal Q3 2026 sales of nearly $83 billion, an 18% year-over-year increase, with non-GAAP earnings up 21% to $4.27 per share.
• In contrast, Cerebras reported 2025 sales of only $500 million and a non-GAAP loss of almost $76 million.
• Microsoft's stock has declined over 8% in the past 12 months, while Cerebras' stock has surged about 60% from its IPO price.
• The article contrasts the financial performance of Microsoft and Cerebras, suggesting investors may be overlooking Microsoft's strong fundamentals in favor of the newer AI stock.
news.Keywords: AI, Cloud Computing, Semiconductor, Financial Performance, Valuation

news.Title: OpenAI Is Going Public But Is It for the Wrong Reasons?
news.Content: The AI sector is about to get even bigger. According to several media reports, OpenAI , the ChatGPT creator is aiming to file confidentially for an IPO in the coming weeks with the goal of going public as soon as September. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » The news comes as another blockbuster IPO, SpaceX, is headed for the public ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI is reportedly planning a confidential IPO in the coming weeks, aiming to go public as soon as September.
• Anthropic, a competitor, is in talks to raise funding at a valuation between $900 billion and $950 billion, potentially surpassing OpenAI's last valuation of $852 billion.
• Anthropic's revenue is expected to more than double from $4.8 billion in Q1 to $10.9 billion in Q2, while OpenAI reached annualized revenue of $25 billion in March, up 17% year-to-date.
• OpenAI is facing a significant cash crunch, with substantial future spending commitments and projected cash flow losses until 2030, suggesting the IPO may be driven by necessity rather than strength.
news.Keywords: IPO, AI, Valuation, Cash Burn, Competition

news.Title: Investors Look Beyond TSMC as AI Boom Spreads to New Winners
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- After several years flying high as Asia’s best Nvidia Corp. proxy, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. is increasingly vying with other artificial intelligence stocks for investor attention. Most Read from Bloomberg Bungie Plans Layoffs After Ending ‘Destiny 2’ Development Spot the Difference: Putin Gets Trump Treatment From Xi in China Iran Says the US’s Latest Proposal Has ‘Narrowed the Gaps’ Iran in Talks With Oman Over Permanent Hormuz Toll System Modi’s Toffee Gift to Meloni Ignites Rally in Wrong Indian Stock Stock traders are chasing a wider array of beneficiaries ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC) is facing increased competition for investor attention from other AI beneficiaries.
• While TSMC shares are up 46% this year, MediaTek and Samsung Electronics have seen gains exceeding 140%.
• TSMC's underperformance is attributed to a diversification trend away from the company as AI adoption broadens.
• The rise of agentic AI is driving demand for a wider range of chips, including CPUs, benefiting companies like MediaTek and Samsung.
• Investment caps and the desire for diversification are pushing funds to explore alternatives beyond TSMC, impacting its relative performance.
news.Keywords: AI beneficiaries, diversification, semiconductor market, chip designers, market performance

news.Title: Analysis-ECB, banks rift hampers Europe's efforts to loosen reliance on US payments giants
news.Content: By Jesús Aguado and Valentina Za MADRID/MILAN, May 22 (Reuters) - Europe's push to curb its dependence on U.S. payments giants Visa and Mastercard has driven a wedge between the European Central Bank and financial firms keen to shield revenues, hobbling efforts to build a home-grown system, several people involved said. More from Yahoo Scout How are European banks resisting the digital euro? What is Europe's digital euro initiative and timeline? What revenue impact would digital euro have? Why is Europe seeking payment system sovereignty? A ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Europe's efforts to reduce reliance on U.S. payment giants like Visa and Mastercard are being hampered by disagreements between the European Central Bank (ECB) and financial firms.
• The ECB plans to introduce a digital euro by 2029, but European banks are concerned about potential customer fund transfers to an ECB-guaranteed wallet and are exploring alternative solutions.
• A proposed cap on merchant fees for digital euro transactions could cost the private payments system an estimated 8 billion to 9 billion euros in lost annual revenues.
• The development of a home-grown European payment system faces challenges due to misaligned incentives and timelines between public and private actors, potentially impacting revenue streams for financial institutions.
news.Keywords: Payment Systems, Digital Euro, Regulatory Hurdles, Merchant Fees, Financial Sovereignty

news.Title: 英特爾晶圓代工業務有進展、打算用這招和台積電競爭　一文掌握陳立武受訪3重點
news.Content:
作者：財訊雙週刊／林信男、財訊新聞中心

上任逾1年的英特爾執行長陳立武，似乎正帶領這家一度搖搖欲墜的企業，逐漸走出泥淖。美東時間5月18日，陳立武接受美國財經媒體CNBC的Mad Money節目專訪，分享英特爾在業務上的 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 英特爾執行長陳立武表示，其18A製程良率已顯著改善，每月提升7%-8%，晶圓代工業務成長16%達54億美元。
• 英特爾預計在2026年下半年獲得客戶的晶圓代工訂單承諾，並將以14A製程與台積電競爭。
• 英特爾第一季資料中心營收年增22%達51億美元，顯示其在AI領域取得進展，CPU需求因AI運算增加而復甦。
news.Keywords: 晶圓代工,製程技術,AI晶片,CPU,競爭策略

news.Content:

news.Content: By Dominique Patton PARIS, May 22 (Reuters) - French company Alice & Bob has won funding from Nvidia 's venture capital arm NVentures, it said on ‌Friday, supporting its development of hardware to make quantum computing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• French quantum computing firm Alice & Bob has received funding from Nvidia's venture capital arm, NVentures.

news.Title: No, Tesla Doesn't Need E.U. Approval to Sell Full Self-Driving (Supervised) in Europe
news.Content: Obtaining approval to sell its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) software in Europe is one of the key catalysts for Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock in 2026. Not only are FSD (Supervised) and other software services becoming an important revenue generator for the company, but the demonstration of FSD (Supervised) is a key precursor of the potential approval of robotaxis using unsupervised FSD in the future. And the good news is that Tesla doesn't need European Union-wide approval to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla does not require a single EU-wide approval to sell its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) software in Europe; it can pursue country-by-country approvals.
• The Netherlands has already approved Tesla's FSD (Supervised) via its Vehicle Authority (RDW), setting a precedent for other countries.
• An EU-wide vote on FSD (Supervised) approval is anticipated in July, but individual countries can grant provisional approvals based on existing data, potentially speeding up market entry.
• The approval of FSD (Supervised) is considered a key catalyst for Tesla's stock, paving the way for potential robotaxi approvals in the future.
news.Keywords: Autonomous Driving, Regulatory Approval, Market Entry, Software Services, Catalysts

news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】蘇姿丰在2014年剛接任AMD執行長後，歷經長達五年的冷言冷語，她提到，但還是認為會成功，因為自己的信念是，搞科技必須看得比浪潮更遠（See ah ...

• 有網友擔心台股漲勢趨緩，加上通膨、國債利率等問題，考慮轉進高股息ETF以求穩健獲利。
• 部分網友認為目前僅是正常震盪，不應因小幅回跌而恐慌，並質疑頻繁轉換策略的有效性。
• 網友指出，高股息ETF配息可能變動，下跌時為維持配息可能變賣虧損資產，影響本金回升。
• 批評者認為，投資策略反覆切換，缺乏中心思想，最終可能兩頭空。
• 提醒投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。
news.Keywords: 台股,高股息ETF,投資策略,市場震盪,資產配置

news.Title: 台積電美元股利設防套利，央行擬限外資一年僅能切換一次幣別
news.Content: 【財訊快報／陳孟朔】路透報導，台灣主管機關推動上市櫃公司對外資發放外幣現金股利後，市場傳出台灣央行計畫針對台積電(2330)等企業未來發放美元股利建立 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台灣央行擬限制外資領取台積電美元股利時，每年僅能切換一次幣別，以防堵套利行為並減緩新台幣匯率波動。
• 此舉旨在降低台積電外資股東的換匯成本，同時避免大型資金頻繁進出新台幣匯市。
• 預計最快於2027年啟動外幣股利發放，此制度有望增加台積電對長線外資的吸引力。
news.Keywords: 美元股利,外資,匯率控管,換匯成本,新台幣

news.Content: 【財訊快報／陳孟朔】路透報導，台灣主管機關推動上市櫃公司對外資發放外幣現金股利後，市場傳出台灣央行計畫針對台積電(2330)等企業未來發放美元股利建立 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台灣主管機關推動上市櫃公司對外資發放外幣現金股利，央行擬建立換匯控管機制，限制外國投資人每年僅能變更一次領取幣別。
• 此舉旨在降低台積電等企業外資股東的換匯成本，並防堵大型資金頻繁進出新台幣匯市，減緩匯市波動。
• 若實施美元股利，企業與外資可減少匯兌成本與匯損風險，台積電因外資持股高且營收以美元計價，為指標性企業。
• 過去台積電採季度配息，外資換匯可能放大新台幣季節性資金流動，美元股利有望紓緩此壓力。
• 預計最快於2027年啟動外幣股利發放，一年僅能變更一次幣別的限制將使台積電對長線外資更具吸引力。
news.Keywords: 台積電,外幣股利,換匯控管,新台幣匯市,外資

news.Title: 蘇姿丰讚台灣擁完整供應鏈，強調海外生產同樣重要
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-22 11:15:16 黃立安 發佈

AMD董事長暨執行長蘇姿丰(附圖)今(22)日出席天下雜誌論壇時表示，AMD目標是在高效能運算(HPC)與AI運算領域取得領導地位，這背後關鍵 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD執行長蘇姿丰表示，AMD目標是在高效能運算(HPC)與AI運算領域取得領導地位，並持續深化與台灣供應鏈合作。
• 她指出，台灣擁有全球唯一完整的半導體生態系，並讚許台灣供應鏈積極往海外擴產是正確方向。

• 蘇姿丰認為，台灣半導體生態系能高度整合與密切合作是獨特優勢，同時全球化分散製造能力同樣重要。

news.Title: AMD ramping up Taiwan capacity as global CPU market tightens
news.Content: By Wen-Yee Lee and Ben Blanchard TAIPEI, May 22 (Reuters) - Advanced Micro Devices is working with Taiwan partners to ramp up production capacity as stronger-than-expected demand squeezes the global CPU market, CEO Lisa Su said on Friday. Speaking in ‌Taipei after a visit to China, Su said she had met AMD's largest customers in China and globally ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD is increasing its production capacity in Taiwan with local partners due to higher-than-expected global CPU demand.
• CEO Lisa Su stated the CPU market is currently 'tight' and expects supply to increase quarterly throughout 2024, with significant expansion planned for 2027 and beyond.
• Growth drivers include AI inferencing and agentic AI, broadening demand for CPUs beyond traditional GPU applications.
• AMD plans to invest over $10 billion in Taiwan's AI sector, focusing on advanced packaging, substrates, and manufacturing for rack-scale systems, and is ramping production of Venice CPUs using TSMC's 2-nanometer process.
news.Keywords: CPU Market, Supply Chain, AI Demand, Manufacturing Capacity, Strategic Investment

news.Title: AMD asking partners to ramp up production, CEO says
news.Content: TAIPEI, May 22 (Reuters) - ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) CEO Lisa Su announced that the company is requesting partners to ramp up production.
• This action is driven by strong demand for AI-related products.
• AMD is a significant customer of TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker.
• The company is seeking to increase its manufacturing output to meet market needs.
news.Keywords: Production Ramp, AI Demand, Supply Chain, Contract Manufacturing, Capacity Expansion

news.Content: 南韓三星電子的勞資談判取得初步共識，工會暫停大罷工的決定，後續待工會成員投票確認是否接受談判結果，罷工危機未完全解除。南韓媒體披露雙方談 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 南韓三星電子的勞資談判取得初步共識，工會暫停大罷工，但罷工危機未完全解除。
• 南韓媒體報導，工會以台積電發放2061億元獎金、人均264萬元為例，向三星資方爭取更高獎金。
• 台積電的獎金發放方式是每年由董事會綜合考量業績、現金流、投資計畫、股東回報等因素決定，並無固定發放比例。
• 三星則在新設半導體部門特別績效獎金，以部門獲利10.5%為財源，觸發條件為未來幾年獲利達標。
• 南韓商界擔心三星模式引發骨牌效應，要求比照標準的聲浪湧現，恐蔓延至其他核心產業。
news.Keywords: 勞資談判,獎金發放,績效獎金,成本結構,產業蔓延

news.Title: Nvidia Just Raised Its Dividend By 2,400% -- and That Wasn't Even the Biggest News From Its Earnings Report
news.Content: AI chipmaker Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) managed to largely hold onto a sharp gain over the last 30 days when it reported earnings. Though the stock fell about 1.8% during the first trading day following its report, the stock is up 9.8% over the last 30 days. The quarterly numbers and the outlook for the period ahead were both exceptional. But tucked into the same release was a capital return ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia reported fiscal Q1 2026 revenue of $81.6 billion, an 85% year-over-year increase and a 20% sequential climb, marking accelerated growth for the third consecutive quarter.
• The data center segment generated a record $75.2 billion in revenue, up 92% year-over-year, with networking revenue soaring 199% to $14.8 billion.
• Non-GAAP earnings per share rose 140% to $1.87, and adjusted gross margin expanded to 75%.
• Nvidia announced a 2,400% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share and authorized an additional $80 billion in share repurchases, alongside generating $48.6 billion in free cash flow.

news.Title: Arm Holdings (ARM) Hits All-Time High as Profits Seen Rocketing 5x
news.Content: Arm Holdings PLC (NASDAQ:ARM) is one of the 10 Stocks With Shocking Overnight Gains. Arm Holdings notched a fresh all-time high anew on Thursday, as investors resumed buying positions after it earned an analyst’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings (ARM) reached an all-time high, driven by an optimistic outlook for fivefold profit growth by 2030.
• Bernstein initiated coverage with an 'outperform' rating and a $300 price target, citing potential for significant profit expansion.
• Arm is expected to increase its CPU market share fourfold in the next four years, reaching $137 billion, due to the shift to agentic AI.
• The company reported a 49% jump in Q4 FY2026 net income to $313 million, with revenues up 20% to $1.49 billion.
• Arm's Q1 FY2027 revenue outlook suggests a 19.6% increase year-over-year.
news.Keywords: CPU market share, profit growth, agentic AI, all-time high, semiconductor technology

news.Title: Why Salesforce Stock Slumped Today
news.Content: For the most part, stocks did well on a generally bullish Thursday for the market, but we can't say the same for Salesforce 's (NYSE: CRM) equity. The customer relationship management (CRM) specialist took a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Salesforce (CRM) stock declined over 2% after an analyst lowered the fair value assessment from $200 to $185.
• The decline occurs amidst concerns about AI disruption potentially impacting legacy software solutions like Salesforce's CRM platform.
• Despite market sentiment, the article argues Salesforce is tech-forward, having launched its agentic AI solution, Agentforce.
• The company reported a 'beat-and-raise' third quarter and exceeded analyst estimates in the fourth quarter with double-digit growth.
• The author believes Salesforce is an underappreciated and competitive player in its segment, making the stock appear as a bargain.
news.Keywords: legacy software, AI disruption, CRM platform, analyst rating, stock valuation

news.Title: Why Nebius Stock Surged Today
news.Content: Shares of Nebius (NASDAQ: NBIS) spiked on Thursday after the data center operator formed a strategic partnership with Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) . Will AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nebius (NBIS) stock surged following a strategic partnership with Bloom Energy (BE) to power AI factories.
• The collaboration aims to integrate Bloom's fuel cell technology into Nebius' AI data centers, addressing power bottlenecks in the AI boom.
• Bloom's fuel cells offer an efficient, low-pollution energy source suitable for AI workloads, generating electricity without combustion.
• Fuel cell systems may face fewer regulatory hurdles, enabling faster deployment compared to combustion-based systems.
• The first joint project, with 328 MW capacity, is expected to commence operations later this year.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, data center, fuel cell technology, strategic partnership, energy solutions

news.Title: Lam Research focused on adding AI to chipmaking tools as it eyes US expansion, CEO says
news.Content: By Stephen Nellis FREMONT, California, May 21 (Reuters) - Lam Research is focused on adding sensing and AI capabilities to its semiconductor manufacturing tools to make them more productive ‌as it plans expanded operations in Arizona and California, its chief executive told Reuters ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lam Research is integrating AI and sensing capabilities into its chipmaking tools to enhance productivity.
• The company plans expanded operations in Arizona and California to support chipmakers like TSMC and Micron.
• Lam Research shares have risen over 75% this year due to high demand for AI chips driving tool purchases.
• AI systems will analyze data from sensors on the tools to identify inefficiencies and reduce chip defects.
• Lam is investing in startups like Lightfinder, which develops miniaturized chip measurement tools for integration into existing machinery.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, AI integration, chipmaking tools, expansion plans, productivity enhancement

news.Title: Texas sues Meta, WhatsApp over encryption privacy claims
news.Content: NEW YORK, May 21 (Reuters) - The Texas Attorney General’s Office on Thursday sued WhatsApp and its parent company Meta ‌Platforms Inc alleging they misled consumers about the strength and ‌scope ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Texas is suing WhatsApp and its parent company Meta Platforms Inc. over alleged misrepresentations regarding encryption.
• The lawsuit claims WhatsApp and Meta misled consumers about the strength of encryption, despite having access to private communications.
• Meta denies the allegations, stating that WhatsApp cannot access users' encrypted communications.
• Texas is seeking a court order to prevent Meta and WhatsApp from accessing user messages without consent, along with monetary penalties.
• This lawsuit follows similar actions by Texas against other tech companies like Google and Netflix concerning data privacy.
news.Keywords: data privacy, encryption, consumer protection, regulatory action, messaging app

news.Title: Lessons from GenXers on Stock Bubbles and Manias
news.Content: (1:00) - What Can We Takeaway From The Past Stock Market Bubbles? (10:15) - Will AI Be The Next Dot-com Bubble? (21:45) - Breaking Down The Current Valuation of The AI Trade Right Now? (46:45) - Episode Roundup: MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA Podcast@zacks.com Welcome to Episode #486 of the Zacks Market Edge Podcast. Every week, host and Zacks stock strategist, Tracey Ryniec, will be joined by guests to discuss the hottest investing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The podcast discusses lessons from past stock market bubbles, particularly the dot-com era, in the context of the current AI boom.
• Key takeaways include managing FOMO, avoiding impulsive decisions like quitting jobs to daytrade, and recognizing signs of a bubble.
• Microsoft (MSFT) shares are down 13.3% year-to-date despite expected earnings growth of 27.1%, with a P/S ratio of 9.8.
• Alphabet (GOOGL) has hit all-time highs with a market cap of $4.7 trillion and expected earnings growth of 32.2%, but a P/S ratio of 11.2.
• NVIDIA (NVDA) is a leader in the AI boom with a market cap of $5.4 billion, showing strong earnings growth but a high P/S ratio of 21.4.
news.Keywords: stock bubbles, AI valuation, market mania, dot-com comparison, investment strategy

The quarter-end value of the position decreased by $63.05 million, reflecting both trading activity and price movements. ...

news.Title: Apple asks US Supreme Court to review contempt order in Epic Games lawsuit
news.Content: By Mike Scarcella WASHINGTON, May 21 (Reuters) - Apple asked the U.S. Supreme Court on Thursday to review a lower court ruling that held the iPhone maker in ‌civil contempt over fees it was charging on some outside purchases made by ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple has petitioned the U.S. Supreme Court to review a lower court's civil contempt order related to App Store fees.
• The contempt order stems from Apple's handling of a lawsuit filed by Epic Games concerning transaction fees on outside purchases.
• Apple is challenging the injunction's applicability to non-class action plaintiffs and argues it cannot be held in contempt for violating the 'spirit' of the order.
• Epic Games views Apple's appeal as a delay tactic to avoid opening up payment competition and potential consumer benefits.
news.Keywords: litigation, regulatory scrutiny, antitrust, app store policy, Supreme Court appeal

news.Title: Main Street can now bet on OpenAl, SpaceX through Polymarket
news.Content: The biggest financial story of the last decade is not what is happening on Wall Street . It is what is happening just outside of it. The most valuable companies of this generation, the ones running cloud infrastructure, satellite internet, rocket launches and a sizable chunk of artificial intelligence research, have spent years deliberately staying private. They have raised tens of billions of dollars without ever filing an S-1. For most working Americans, that has been a closed loop. You can buy Tesla ( TSLA ) stock through your brokerage account today. You cannot buy SpaceX stock, no matter how ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Prediction market platform Polymarket has launched event contracts tied to the performance of private companies like OpenAI and SpaceX.
• This initiative, in partnership with Nasdaq Private Market, allows individuals to bet on milestones and valuations of these pre-IPO companies.
• The platform aims to provide access to the performance of high-value private companies, which have historically been inaccessible to most investors.
• Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the parent company of the NYSE, has invested significantly in Polymarket, indicating strategic interest in this parallel market for sentiment.
news.Keywords: private markets, prediction markets, venture capital, alternative investments, market sentiment

news.Title: Amazon.com Shareholders Back Board as Jassy Touts AI, AWS Growth at Annual Meeting
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Amazon.com, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. CEO Andy Jassy emphasized Amazon’s AI and AWS momentum , saying AWS revenue grew 28% in Q1 2026 to a $150 billion run rate and that AWS AI revenue exceeded $15 billion on an annualized basis. CFO Brian Olsavsky said Amazon’s 2025 sales rose 12% to $716.9 billion , with AWS sales up 20% to $129 billion, but ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon.com shareholders approved the board's director nominees, auditor, and executive pay at the annual meeting.
• CEO Andy Jassy highlighted strong AI and AWS growth, with AWS revenue reaching a $150 billion run rate and AWS AI revenue exceeding $15 billion annualized.
• Full-year 2025 sales were $716.9 billion, up 12%, with AWS sales up 20% to $129 billion, though free cash flow declined due to increased AI infrastructure spending.
• Several shareholder proposals concerning data center risks, climate commitments, and AI advisory councils were rejected.
news.Keywords: shareholder meeting, AWS growth, AI infrastructure, capital expenditure, financial results

news.Title: The Path to 'Peak' Nvidia: Why the AI Giant's Future Will Inevitably Include Stiff Competition
news.Content: Wall Street has already grown thoroughly accustomed to the nearly non-stop expansion of Nvidia's (NVDA) market capitalization. news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Seagate stock price falls after CEO's rattling warning

His answer rattled the room. New plants " would just take too long ," he said, and could leave Seagate with more capacity than it needs. That single comment dragged down the whole memory group, pulling Micron ( MU ), ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Seagate Technology (STX) stock fell significantly after its CEO warned about long lead times for recording head wafers (over nine months) and finished drives (an additional quarter).
• The CEO's comments suggested that Seagate cannot build new factories quickly enough to meet soaring AI storage demand, potentially leaving the company with excess capacity if demand shifts.
• The warning negatively impacted other memory stocks, including Micron (MU), Western Digital (WDC), and SanDisk (SNDK), which also experienced declines.

June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26) are down -0.40%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures (NQM26) are down -0.49%. Stock indexes are retreating today as crude oil prices and bond yields spike higher on doubts about a US-Iran peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Crude prices jumped more than +3% after Reuters reported that Iran's Supreme Leader said enriched uranium must stay in Iran, as sending the material abroad ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Stock indexes (S&P 500, Dow Jones, Nasdaq 100) are retreating due to doubts over a US-Iran peace deal, leading to spikes in crude oil prices and bond yields.
• Crude prices jumped over 3% after reports indicated Iran's enriched uranium would stay in the country, tempering optimism for a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
• NVIDIA's (NVDA) earnings beat expectations, but some analysts question the sustainability of its growth amid increasing competition.
• Economic news showed labor market stability and strength in manufacturing and housing, but the Philadelphia Fed business outlook survey fell.
• The article notes that while Q1 S&P 500 earnings are projected to climb +12% y/y, excluding the technology sector, growth is much weaker.
news.Keywords: geopolitical risk, oil prices, bond yields, market sentiment, economic indicators

news.Title: Navitas vs onsemi: Which Stock Wins the AI Power Infrastructure Race?
news.Content: As artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping data center infrastructure, power semiconductors have emerged as one of the market’s hottest battlegrounds. That has pushed shares of ON Semiconductor ON and Navitas Semiconductor NVTS sharply higher, with the latter soaring 222% year to date and the former gaining 103.5%. Both companies are riding the trend toward higher-voltage, energy-efficient AI power architectures. Their gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) chips help deliver faster switching speeds, lower heat and better power efficiency than traditional silicon solutions. But while onsemi is a profitable industry heavyweight (with a market cap of roughly $43 billion), Navitas ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Both ON Semiconductor (onsemi) and Navitas Semiconductor are benefiting from the AI power infrastructure race, with onsemi up 103.5% and Navitas up 222% year-to-date.
• Navitas is an emerging growth story, with its AI infrastructure business growing 50% sequentially in Q1 2026 and targeting a $1.4-$2.5 billion AI data center market by 2030.
• onsemi, a profitable industry heavyweight, saw its AI data center revenues jump over 30% sequentially in Q1 and expects them to double year-over-year in 2026.
• Navitas faces risks due to its small scale and unprofitability, while onsemi offers scale, profitability, and proven execution in high-growth markets like AI data centers.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, power semiconductors, gallium nitride, silicon carbide, market share

news.Title: AI Factory Partnership With Rebellions Sends Credo's Shares Up 8%
news.Content: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd CRDO shares surged 8.3% in trading yesterday and closed at $182.98. The catalyst behind the rally was Credo’s collaboration with Rebellions. By integrating Credo’s ZeroFlap active electrical cables (AECs) into Rebellions’ RebelPOD AI infrastructure platform, the two companies aim to deliver scalable, turnkey AI factories optimized for enterprise inference workloads. In high-utilization clusters, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Credo Technology Group (CRDO) shares surged 8.3% following the announcement of a partnership with Rebellions to create AI factories.
• The collaboration integrates Credo's ZeroFlap active electrical cables (AECs) into Rebellions' RebelPOD AI infrastructure platform for enterprise inference workloads.
• This partnership aims to enhance AI infrastructure resilience and predictability, potentially accelerating Credo's revenue growth in the AI inference market.
• The deal diversifies Credo's customer base beyond hyperscalers into enterprise AI markets and strengthens its position in AI networking solutions.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, strategic partnership, semiconductor networking, inference workloads, revenue growth

news.AI_Summary:
• 公司股東常會決議，許可特定董事從事與公司營業範圍相同或類似的投資或經營行為。
• 此競業行為許可期間為 2026年5月21日至2029年5月20日。
• 股東會以表決方式通過此項議案，出席股東表決權數中，贊成權數佔總權數一定比例。
• 此決議不涉及大陸地區事業營運，對公司財務業務影響程度為不適用。

news.Content: 記憶體廠南亞科 (2408-TW) 今 (21) 日召開股東會，董事長鄒明仁指出，受到人工智慧需求爆發帶動，全球記憶體產業已經由過去波動劇烈的傳統景氣循環模式，正式轉變為健康健 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 南亞科預期AI需求帶動記憶體產業結構性增長，供不應求將延續至2027年底。
• 公司去年合併營收665.9億元，年增95%，稅後淨利26億元，EPS 2.13元，成功轉虧為盈。
• 股東會通過盈餘分配案，預計8月6日發放每股1.35元現金股利。
• 董事會決議調升2026年資本支出預算至超過520億元，用於先進製程與5A新廠擴建，預計2027年下半年量產。

news.Title: 〈南亞科股東會〉資本支出衝破520億元 總座看供不應求將延續2027年底
news.Content: 記憶體廠南亞科 (2408-TW) 今 (21) 日召開股東會，董事長鄒明仁指出，受到人工智慧需求爆發帶動，全球記憶體產業已經由過去波動劇烈的傳統景氣循環模式，正式轉變為健康健 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 南亞科預期AI需求帶動記憶體產業結構性增長，供不應求將延續至2027年底。
• 公司去年合併營收665.9億元，年增95%，稅後淨利26億元，EPS 2.13元，成功轉虧為盈。
• 股東會通過盈餘分配案，預計8月6日發放每股1.35元現金股利。
• 董事會決議調升2026年資本支出預算至超過520億元，用於先進製程與5A新廠擴建，預計2027年下半年量產。
news.Keywords: AI需求,記憶體供需,資本支出,營收成長,轉虧為盈

news.Title: 三星罷工矛盾台廠大利多？群聯這樣看 記憶體大老看法曝
news.Content: 三星（Samsung）近期爆發罷工衝突，市場關注是否進一步牽動DRAM與NAND Flash供需及價格走勢。群聯電子發言人呂國鼎今（21）日受訪表示，三星同時是群聯友好的客戶與供應商，因此不方便在此事件 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星罷工事件引發市場對DRAM與NAND Flash供需及價格走勢的關注。
• 群聯電子發言人表示，短期市場可能受心理因素影響，但實際供給影響仍需觀察罷工持續時間。
• 南亞科總經理認為，三星罷工事件影響應為短期效應，長期仍會回歸穩定；但DRAM產業結構性變化後已進入穩定階段，供給吃緊預期延續到明年底。
• 威剛董事長表示，三星罷工對全年產能影響有限，但已引發市場強烈預期心理，可能推升DRAM與NAND Flash價格。
• 群聯坦言原廠處於缺貨狀態，配貨邏輯將更重視附加價值，群聯透過自研技術爭取更多供貨支持。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,DRAM,NAND Flash,罷工,供需

news.Title: 《美股》油價/殖利率摔 輝達財報前CPU股/費半嗨
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-21 06:39:27 郭妍希 發佈

投資人期待中東衝突很快就能解決，帶動油價、美國公債殖利率雙雙下挫，也激勵美國四大指數全面強彈，科技與晶片類股在輝達(Nvidia Corp.)公布財報前全面跳漲 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受中東衝突緩解預期影響，油價及公債殖利率下跌，美股四大指數全面上漲，費城半導體指數大漲4.49%。
• 輝達(Nvidia)將公布財報，市場關注其毛利率及中國市場銷售布局，輝達股價盤前上漲1.3%。
• 半導體類股普遍走強，包括安謀(Arm Holdings)大漲15.05%，英特爾(Intel)及超微(AMD)勁揚超過7%。
• ASML執行長表示，AI、衛星和機器人需求帶動半導體市場將維持供給緊繃狀態，ASML ADR勁揚6.21%。

news.Title: Stocks Finish Sharply Higher on Iran Hopes
news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) on Wednesday closed up +1.08%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) closed up +1.31%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) closed up +1.66%. • The rally was driven by a significant drop in crude oil prices (over 5%) due to hopes for a resolution in the Iran conflict, which lowered inflation expectations and bond yields.
• Semiconductor stocks also rallied, with Nvidia showing a gain ahead of its earnings report, which is expected to provide insights into the AI economy.

news.Title: Cisco stock flashes rare technical signal
news.Content: Back in 2025, when Cisco Systems ( CSCO ) was trading around $66, key support, recommending it felt like a contrarian bet. The stock had spent years in the slow lane - a legacy networking name that the market had largely written off while flashier AI plays grabbed the headlines. Fast forward to now, and that bet has nearly doubled. As of Friday's close, according to TheStreet Pro , CSCO was up 98.6% from an entry point recommended by analyst Ed Ponsi in 2024. The stock is now trading far above every major moving average , AI orders are quadrupling, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco Systems (CSCO) stock has seen a nearly 99% increase from a recommended entry point in 2024, trading significantly above major moving averages.
• The company reported record quarterly revenue of $15.8 billion in Q3 fiscal 2026, up 12% year-over-year, with non-GAAP EPS at $1.06 (up 10% YoY).
• Total product orders surged 35% YoY, with AI infrastructure orders for the full fiscal year raised to $9 billion from $5 billion.
• A rare technical signal, a Relative Strength Index (RSI) close to 90 on May 19, indicates the stock is in extreme overbought territory, suggesting a potential short-term pause or pullback.
• Cisco provided Q4 fiscal 2026 guidance for revenue between $16.7-$16.9 billion and non-GAAP EPS of $1.16-$1.18, with full-year revenue guidance of $62.8-$63.0 billion.
news.Keywords: technical signal, record revenue, AI orders, earnings per share, dividend

news.AI_Summary:
• 韓國KOSPI指數收跌0.86%，KOSDAQ指數下跌2.61%。
• 下跌主因包括美債殖利率攀升、國際油價上漲及外資連續淨賣超。

news.Keywords: 宏觀壓力,殖利率攀升,外資賣超,權值股,市場波動

news.Title: 三星大罷工點火記憶體族群！南亞科威剛股價走揚 分析師：短線題材
news.Content: 三星電子工會與資方調解破局，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，市場預估有望帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群今（20）日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星電子工會與資方調解破裂，確定自5月21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，預期可能帶動記憶體報價上漲。
• 受此消息影響，台記憶體族群今日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408）、威剛（3260）、創見（2451）等個股同步走揚。
• 分析師指出，三星罷工題材有助短線激勵記憶體股，但後續漲勢需觀察個股是否能突破盤整區間。
• 華邦電（2344）股價盤中震盪，跌幅收斂至約1.7%；南亞科則上漲約2%。
• 分析師建議，在盤整期間可考慮將資金暫時撤出，待趨勢重新翻多後再介入，並以華邦電為例，突破128元區間上緣才算確認新一輪多頭趨勢。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,罷工,供需預期,股價走勢,技術分析

news.Content: 三星電子工會與資方調解破局，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，市場預估有望帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群今（20）日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星電子工會因調解破裂，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工。
• 市場預期罷工可能帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群如南亞科、威剛、創見等今日止跌回穩並走揚。
• 分析師指出，三星罷工題材對短線記憶體股有激勵效果，但後續漲勢需觀察個股是否能突破盤整區間。
• 儘管基本面預期缺貨持續至2027年，但近期股價修正主因在於上漲後籌碼混亂，建議待趨勢翻多後再介入。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,罷工,供需,籌碼,技術面

道瓊工業平均指數5月19 ...

news.AI_Summary:
• Silicon Motion Technology (SIMO) is highlighted as a smaller AI stock with the potential for significant growth, having nearly tripled year-to-date.
• The company's Q1 2026 revenue of $342.1 million significantly surpassed guidance, showing 105% year-over-year growth and beating expectations.

news.Content: Cirrus Logic, Inc. news.AI_Summary:

• The company reported Q4 fiscal 2026 results that surpassed estimates, though revenue declined 23% sequentially due to weaker smartphone shipments.

Out of this, cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities stood at $887.7 million. This financial strength is cushioned by solid cash generation. news.AI_Summary:
• Cirrus Logic (CRUS) ended fiscal 2026 with $1.2 billion in cash and no debt, demonstrating strong financial flexibility and solid cash generation of $650.6 million.
• The company plans to increase R&D spending in fiscal 2027 to support innovation and diversification into new markets like industrial, imaging, automotive, and professional audio.

news.Title: 記憶體血流成河 誰被錯殺？專家拆解「3大鬼故事」：你相信黃仁勳還是三星高層
news.Content: 台股記憶體族群今（19）日驚現全面性重挫，包括南亞科、華邦電、旺宏、鈺創、群聯、愛普等六檔個股全數慘殺至跌停。面對大陸廠大幅擴產、三星罷工轉單落空，以及群聯發行海外可轉債（ECB）等市場傳聞夾擊，專家直言這些利空皆為短線的「鬼故事 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股記憶體族群今日全面重挫，南亞科、華邦電等六檔個股跌停。
• 專家認為大陸廠擴產、三星罷工轉單落空、群聯發行ECB等傳聞為短線「鬼故事」，基本面並未轉壞。
• 分析師指出，南亞科與華邦電產能已接近滿載，轉單效應僅為加分項，即使無轉單基本面仍強勁。
• 群聯發行ECB被解讀為「短空長多」，有利於公司未來籌措資金及股價表現。
• 記憶體族群具備低本益比、高殖利率特性，在利率走高時具吸引力，建議尋找被誤殺的價值股進行操作。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,跌停,基本面,轉單效應,可轉債

news.Title: 記憶體又遭血洗！群聯慘跌停、南亞科崩9％ 兇手竟是這大廠拋出警訊？
news.Content: 記憶體族群今（19）日遭逢利空突襲，盤中湧現爆量恐慌賣壓，指標股群聯亮燈跌停，華邦電、南亞科、旺宏等紛紛暴跌9%，短線多方信心備受打擊。市場利空主要來自硬碟機大廠希捷（Seagate）發出警告，強調公司寧可選擇「技術轉型」也不盲目 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 記憶體族群今日遭逢利空，群聯(8299.TWO)亮燈跌停，華邦電、南亞科、旺宏等紛紛重挫。
• 主要利空來自硬碟大廠希捷(Seagate)警告寧可技術轉型也不盲目擴產，引發市場對產能過剩的擔憂。
• DRAM現貨價格持續出現雜音，先前市場復甦預期蒙上陰影。
• 專家示警，若現貨價持續走低與合約價出現「死亡交叉」，可能重演產業反轉修正走勢。
news.Keywords: 記憶體族群,群聯,希捷,產能過剩,DRAM現貨價

news.Title: How Big Could the AI Data Center Opportunity Be for Navitas?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure is set to become a major long-term growth catalyst for Navitas Semiconductor NVTS as hyperscalers are increasing power requirements inside next-generation data centers. This shift is creating a large and fast-growing opportunity for the company’s gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) power semiconductor portfolio. The company estimates the AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) is positioned to benefit from the AI infrastructure boom, with the AI data center market estimated to be a $1.4-$2.5 billion SAM opportunity by 2030.
• The company projects GaN and SiC adoption in AI data centers to grow at a 66-87% CAGR between 2025 and 2030, driven by efficiency and power density demands.
• Navitas estimates potential GaN and SiC semiconductor content of $25,000-$35,000 per megawatt in future AI infrastructure deployments.
• AI infrastructure revenues for Navitas grew 50% sequentially in Q1 2026, exceeding expectations, and the company believes its dual GaN/SiC offering provides a strategic advantage.
news.Keywords: AI data centers, power semiconductors, GaN, SiC, market opportunity

news.Title: ON Semiconductor Stock Soars 60% in 3 Months: Still a Smart Bet?
news.Content: ON Semiconductor Corporation ON has been one of the semiconductor sector’s strongest performers lately, with the stock surging 60.1% over the past three months, compared with the industry’s rise of 29.2%. The rally has been fueled by a combination of improving cyclical demand, accelerating artificial intelligence data-center opportunities and rising confidence that the company has moved beyond the worst phase of the semiconductor downturn. Investors were especially encouraged by ON Semiconductor’s first-quarter 2026 results, where both revenues and earnings exceeded expectations while management projected stronger growth ahead. A major driver behind the stock’s sharp ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ON Semiconductor (ON) stock has surged 60.1% in three months, outperforming the semiconductor sector, driven by improving cyclical demand and AI data center opportunities.
• First-quarter 2026 results exceeded expectations, with AI data center revenues up over 30% sequentially and projected to double year-over-year in 2026.
• The company is a key beneficiary of AI infrastructure growth, supplying power-management chips for AI servers and hyperscale data centers.
• Automotive semiconductor revenues reached $797 million in Q1 2026, returning to growth, with significant traction in EVs, especially in China, and adoption of its Treo platform for next-gen vehicle architectures.
• Gross margin expanded to 38.5% in Q1 2026, with expectations for further improvement due to rising utilization and higher-margin product mix.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, automotive semiconductors, power management, cyclical recovery, margin expansion

news.Title: STMicroelectronics (STM) Introduces Next-Gen Ultralow-Power Global-Shutter Image Sensors
news.Content: STMicroelectronics (NYSE: STM ) is one of the best performing semiconductor stocks so ...
news.AI_Summary:
• STMicroelectronics (STM) has introduced its next generation of ultralow-power global-shutter image sensors, the VD55G4 (monochrome) and VD65G4 (RGB).
• These sensors are designed for battery-operated or energy-harvesting personal electronics, targeting high-growth applications like wearables, AR/VR/XR headsets, and smart home devices.
• The new sensors feature an optimized detect-and-wake architecture, consuming up to 10x less power than conventional sensors, enabling event-driven operation and extended battery life.
• This technology allows for AI-ready data processing at the edge, reducing standby power consumption.
news.Keywords: image sensors, ultralow-power, IoT, wearables, edge AI

• Hyundai Motor、HD Hyundai Heavy Industries、LG Energy Solution等非半導體權值股承壓下跌。
news.Keywords: 韓國股市, KOSPI指數, 半導體股, 勞資爭議, 權值股

news.Title: 【國票金控晨訊】台股估盤下開出 盤中留意權值股
news.Content:
日期：2026年 5月18日

※操作建議與結論

通膨憂慮再起，美股全數收跌 台股高檔震盪加劇，留意記 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受通膨憂慮及美債殖利率上升影響，美股全數收跌，台積電ADR下跌3.2%，台指期夜盤下跌487點，預估台股今日盤下開出。
• 市場關注記憶體族群的布局機會，因記憶體報價持續在高檔，且龍頭廠三星電子可能罷工，加劇供應緊張。
• 美中關係未明顯降溫，加上荷姆茲海峽仍未順利通航，高油價持續引發市場對通膨的擔憂。
• 操作上建議避免追高，並留意記憶體族群的布局時機。
• 重點推薦產業與族群包括記憶體相關的南亞科、宜鼎、群聯，以及新增標的昇陽半導體。
news.Keywords: 台股預期, 記憶體族群, 通膨擔憂, 三星罷工風險, 盤勢分析

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】多頭架構鬆動　台股震盪回測支撐
news.Content:
日期：2026年 5月18日

※盤勢分析

美、日公債殖利率飆升，避險情緒攀升，台股震盪回測支撐

※昨日盤勢

路透社傳美國擬批准輝達向中國出口H200晶片的消息，市場情緒瞬間被點燃

，台股順勢以41830點紅盤開出，早盤最高甚至衝上 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股昨日（5月15日）因美國公債殖利率飆升及地緣政治擔憂，指數大跌579點，收於41172點，成交量1.31兆元。
• 權值股表現疲弱，台積電下跌0.22%，聯發科下跌4.25%，廣達下跌8.52%，顯示多頭架構鬆動。
• 台積電宣布計劃出售不超過1.52億股世界先進（5347）持股，約佔8.1%，預計採鉅額交易方式出售予財務投資機構。
• 技術面上，台股周K線留下長上影線，KD與RSI轉弱，MACD柱狀體由紅翻黑，預示短期回檔整理未結束，建議多看少做。
• 市場關注輝達財報及Computex展，但全球通膨隱憂、油價走揚及美日公債殖利率飆升，建議降低槓桿及持股成數。
news.Keywords: 台股,技術面,籌碼面,財報,通膨

news.Title: 《美股》川習會沒突破+憂通膨 輝達/費半臉綠
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 06:19:54 郭妍希 發佈

受到油價跳高引發全球通膨疑慮、公債殖利率跳升衝擊，美國四大指數15日全面拉回。

道瓊工業平均指數5月15日終場下跌1.07%(537.29點)、收49,526.17點；週 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國股市週五（5月15日）全面拉回，道瓊工業指數下跌1.07%，那斯達克指數下跌1.54%，標準普爾500指數下跌1.24%，費城半導體指數重挫4.02%。
• 油價跳高引發通膨疑慮，美國10年期公債殖利率觸及2025年5月以來新高，市場預期聯準會12月升息機率升至40%。
• 川習會未有實質突破，中國未明確協助解決美伊衝突，市場失望；輝達因出口管制疑慮下跌4.42%，台積電ADR及AMD ADR同步下滑。
• 安謀(Arm Holdings PLC)因面臨美國聯邦貿易委員會(FTC)反壟斷調查，股價重挫8.46%，跌幅居費半成分股之冠。
• 儘管面臨賣壓，標普500指數仍連續七週上漲，創2023年12月以來新高；微軟因艾克曼旗下基金揭露持股而逆勢勁揚3.05%。
news.Keywords: 美股,通膨,公債殖利率,地緣政治,半導體

news.Title: Jim Cramer on Silicon Motion: “You Buy Some, and Then You Wait for a Pullback”
news.Content: Silicon Motion Technology Corporation (NASDAQ: SIMO ) was among Jim Cramer’s Mad Money stock calls as he urged investors to exercise caution when it comes to red-hot AI stocks . When a caller asked about the stock, Cramer stated: That is called SIMO… And we like SIMO. I know it’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Jim Cramer recommends buying Silicon Motion (SIMO) but suggests waiting for a pullback due to its recent significant price appreciation.
• Silicon Motion develops and markets NAND flash controllers and specialized storage solutions for computing, enterprise data centers, and mobile devices.
• The company has transitioned towards higher-margin, leading-edge applications driven by hyperscaler demands, moving away from lower-margin consumer electronics.
• Heartland Advisors believes SIMO remains undervalued, with a price target of $185 compared to its current trading price of $117, factoring in an anticipated $160 million cash settlement from an arbitration case.
news.Keywords: stock recommendation, NAND flash controllers, data center storage, hyperscaler demand, undervaluation
